To apply for certification/ Diploma programmes, students must visit the college's official website to apply for their desired programme. Students can go through the following steps for detailed steps of applications:

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute?
faqs.answer:
To get admission to Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute courses, candidates need to go through different levels of admission process. It begins with online registration, followed by completing selection rounds and making the course fee payment. Check below for detailed JRVGTI admission process:
Application Process: The registration process for Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute and courses offered under Advanced Diploma in Collaboration With Fergusson College is conducted in an online mode by visiting the offcial website of the respective colleges.
Selection Rounds: Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute admissions are completely merit-based. Students are admitted based on their past academic scores obtained in Class 12. This eligibility criteria is common for all Diploma and Certification programmes offered at the college. Moreover, eligible students are offered admission based on first-cum-first-serve basis.
Final Admission: At last, the finalised students must pay the course fee to confirm their admissions.

faqs.question: Why choose Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute?
faqs.answer: Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute is one of the renowned colleges in Pune, Maharashtra to offer quality education to students, mainly in the field of Arts and Design. JRVGTI has also been accredited by NAAC with an A+ grade. The college provides an Advanced Diploma programme to students in collaboration with the Fergusson College and certificates to students through its certificate courses.  Some of the top recruiters at Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute Pune are Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, Godrej Interio, Persistent, Asian Paints, Reliance Industries, Antara Design, etc.

faqs.question: Which courses does Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute offer?
faqs.answer:
Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute offers courses at Certificate and Diploma level. These courses are available in part/ full-time mode. The certificate courses are offered at JRVGTI, whereas the college also provides Advance Diploma in Collaboration with Fergusson College. Candidates can pursue courses in the following specialisations:
Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing )
Design
Hospitality & Travel
Beauty & Photography

college_info.intro:
Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute offers an Advanced Diploma programme to students as its flagship course. The college offers this programme to students in collaboration with the Fergusson College. Further, the college offers an advanced diploma programme in full-time mode, across several specialisations such as Advertising Communication Design, Landscape Design, Interior Design, etc.
Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute courses are offered to students for a duration of 2 years. Candidates seeking a career in the Arts, Design, Photography, and Hospitality fields can pursue this course. The career options available after pursuing this course are Graphic Designer, UI/UX, Freelance Designer, Site Planner, Horticulturist, Interior Designer, and many more. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at JRVGTI Pune in the table provided below:

placements.overview: Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute placement 2024 details are not out yet. It will be updated once it is released. The college provides several opportunities to students for industry exposure, internships, and placement assistance by a dedicated placement team. Further, the college guarantees placement assistance to students and offers job opportunities in renowned brands such as Persistent, TATA, Exela Technologies, Anunaad, Elephant, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, etc.

paragraphs: JRVGTI -Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Instituteadmissions 2025are merit-based. The college offers diversity of courses mainly in four streams, namely Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Hospitality & Travel and Beauty & Photography. Students can pursue certificate courses such as Digital photography, Gemmology and Diamond Grading, Travel atJagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute. However, another option is to pursue Advance Diploma in Collaboration with Fergusson College in a wide range of specialisations such as Interior Design, Landscape Design and Advertising and Communication Desing (Graphic Design).

JRVGTI admissions are merit-based for both Certificate and Diploma level courses. Candidates must meet the basic educational requirements of the courses at the time of admission. More course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related to Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute course admissions 2025 are as follows:
Know more aboutJagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute courses
Download:JRVGTI Brochure 2025

Step 2: Selection Rounds

Jagannath Rathi Vocational Guidance and Training Institute admissions are completely merit-based. Students are admitted based on their past academic scores obtained in Class 12. This eligibility criteria is common for all Diploma and Certification programmes offered at the college. Moreover, eligible students are offered admission based on first-come-first-serve basis.
Step 3: Final Admission
At last, the finalised students must pay the course fee to confirm their admissions.

admission_process.title: DY Patil Pune Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: DY Patil Pune admission process begins with theregistrationfor respective undergraduate and postgraduate courses on its official website. Before registering candidates seeking admission must ensure that they are meeting the specifiedeligibilitycriteria set by the university. Next, candidates must appear foruniversity-level examsfor their desired courses. To get to know the detailed process for DY Patil admission 2025, refer to the detailed steps below:
Step 1: Fill out the application form

For DY Patil course admissions, candidates have to fill out anonline application formand register for the respective entrance exam. The application form can be fetched on the official website of the university, once the application window gets open. While filling out the application form, candidates have to mention all the basic details such as personal and educational information along with paying the application fee. The application fee may vary from course to course. Simultaneously, aspirants must also pay for the processing/ entrance exam fee at the time of filling out the application form.
Website:https://admissions.dpu.edu.in/
Step 2: Selection Rounds

DY Patil admission process is entirely based on valid scores of entrance exams. Most of the entrance exams are conducted at the university level. For admission to MBA, BTech, and other Medical courses, the university also accepts scores of state/ national-level entrance exams such as CAT,MAT, JEE Main, NEET UG, etc. These candidates can directly apply online and appear for the next selection round such as GD/PI (wherever applicable).
Step 3: Result Declaration & Counselling Process

After the completion of all selection rounds, the university declares the course-wise final result. By fetching the result from the university's official website, candidates can appear for the counselling process for the final seat allotment as per the defined schedule.
Step 4: Final Admission

Once the selection process is completed, the selected candidates have to pay a certain amount ofcourse feeto confirm their seats for the respective course. University eligibility & registration fees are payable for the first year only viaNEFT/ RTGS/ DDin favor of:'Registrar, Dr. D. Y. Patil Vidyapeeth,Pimpri, Pune'.
Dr. D.Y. Patil Vidyapeeth includes various components in the fee structure which include tuition fees, hostel fees, medical insurance, mess, and other deposits.

Coming to affordability,It is among the causes of the high dropout rates from colleges and universities. While financial aid and student loans have made education more accessible, qualifying for a loan or scholarship still has conditions that can be difficult to meet. Below areD.Y. Patil Vidyapeeth tuition feesalong with average package details for popular courses:
Popular Courses
Tuition Fees (Investment)
Average Package (Return)
INR 2.6 lakh - INR 6 lakh
INR 5.5 lakh - INR 25.45 lakh
Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university-sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The seat intake of each programme varies at D.Y. Patil Pune. Medical programmes have a limited number of seats available, while Management courses have a larger intake. The seat distribution of theMBBSprogramme is212forGeneral Categorystudents and38forNRIstudents, so the total seats are 250 at the university. Seats will be allotted to eligible students based on a valid score obtained in the respective entrance examination. Check out below the seat intake for popular courses at D.Y. Patil Vidyapeeth, Pune:
Popular Courses

Eligible candidates should fill out the online application form to apply for the reservation, and submit their cast certificates. If any seat remains, that will be allotted to inter-merit students of the common merit list i.e. General category. For other programmes reservation details, candidates can visit the official website. placement_data.title: DY Patil Pune Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: As per the latest DY Patil Vidyapeeth Pune placement report of School of Science and Technology overall 73 companies have offered placements or internships to students in 2025. While the placement process for 2025 is still ongoing, more than 320 students have secured placements or are doing internships.The highest PPO offered was INR 12 LPA . In 2024, the total number of placements was more than 200 . The highest stipend recorded was INR 50,000 per month. Currently, there are 62 internships in progress, which amounted to 215 in 2024, with opportunities at prominent companies such as Qspider, Edunet Foundations, TATA Motors, Doggle, and Prodigy Infotech,etc.

A total of 192 students secured placements and the average package stood at INR 5.40 LPA. For MBA placements 2024, the highest package recorded during DY Patil VIdyapeeth, Pune placements, the highest package recorded was INR 12 LPA .

DY Patil Pune NEET UG cutoff 2025 has been published for admission to MBBS and BDS courses for various categories and rounds under the All India quota. For the General AI category, the cutoff in the last round for the MBBS course was 660786. On the other hand, for the BDS course, the last round cutoff was 786096. This difference in the ranks suggests that the competition for the MBBS course is higher than for the BDS course.

DY Patil Pune MBBS Cutoff 2025 was 660786 for the General AI category. In 2024 and 2023, the cutoffs were 377556 and 353475, respectively, in the last round. After analysing the cutoff ranks we can say that the competition has decreased over the years.
For more such analyses for other rounds, categories, course, see the table below and use the filters given.

Dr D.Y. Patil Vidyapeeth, Pune, accepts the NEET UG entrance examination results for admission to the MBBS and BDS courses. Students who participated in the NEET UG counselling rounds can refer to the table below to know the cutoff round and year-wise for 2025, 2024, and 2023. Students who are preparing for the upcoming academic term can also look at the qualifying ranks to get an idea of the cutoff trends.

The DY Patil Pune NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to the PG-level courses till round 2 for all categories under the All India quota. For the General AI category, the last round cutoff ranged between 37823 and 121505, wherein MD in General Medicine was the hardest course for admission. On the other hand, the easiest course for admission was the MD in Community Medicine for this aforementioned category.

The DY Patil Pune MD Cutoff 2025 is acceptable for admission to MS and MD courses. For the General AI category, the top three hardest courses for admission were MD in General Medicine, followed by MD in Dermatology, Venereology and Leprosy, and MD in Radiodiagnosis, with the round 2 closing ranks of 37823, 45698 and 48632, respectively.

Analysing the cutoff for the previous years helps students better prepare for the upcoming admission cycle. DY Patil Pune accepts the NEET PG results for admission to MD and MS courses. The DY Patil Pune NEET MDS Cutoff 2025 was published for admission to the MDS course for all rounds and various categories under the All India quota. For the General AI category, the last round cutoff fell between 4598 and 22455, wherein MDS in Prosthodontics and Crown & Bridge proved to be the toughest course for admission, with the lowest rank of 4598. The lower the rank, the higher the competition.

The DY Patil Pune MDS cutoff 2025 was released in the form of opening and closing ranks. According to the last round, the hardest course among all was MDS in Prosthodontics and Crown & Bridge, with a cutoff rank of 4329. In 2024 and 2023, the cutoffs were 3820 and 6299, respectively.

This difference in the ranks says that the competition for this course has seen fluctuation in past years. Students can check out the table below to know the cutoff for 2025, 2024, and 2023 for various other cou

According to the NIRF Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #71 rank in the Overall category, #41 under University, #12 under Medical, and #4 under Dental. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around DY Patil Pune rankings.

nirf.description:
DY Patil Pune has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, DY Patil Pune fell 8 ranks to #71 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, DY Patil Pune climbed 3 ranks to #41 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Medical' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, DY Patil Pune fell 1 rank to #12 rank in the 'Medical' category by the NIRF ranking.

highlights.summary:
The QS Rankings 2026 are out now. Pondicherry University has been ranked 1201-1400 under the 'World University' category.

Pondicherry University admissions 2025-26 are open for PG and PG Diploma courses based on CUET-PG score. Interested candidates can apply for their desired course through the official university's website. A few more updates are as follows:

100 colleges and 11 research institutions Check here 2022-23 list

college_info.intro:
Pondicherry University offers UG, PG and Phd courses in Science, Arts, Management, Commerce, Law, Education, Social Sciences and other fields. These are offered by fourteen different schools, namely the School of Education, School of Mathematical Sciences and School of Humanities among others. Apart from this, the university runs a special programme, called Study India Programme (SIP) for international students. SIP offers both semester and short-term programmes only for international students based on the requirements of foreign universities.
While the flagship course of the University is MSc which is offered across different specialisations, other courses including MA, MBA, BA, and BSc are also popular at Pondicherry University. While the duration of UG courses is mostly three years, the PG and integrated courses are offered for a duration of two and five years, respectively. Some of the popular Pondicherry University courses are shown below, along with their eligibility requirements and fees:

faqs.answer: A:    Admission to a majority of postgraduate and integrated postgraduate level courses at Pondicherry University is subject to CUET UG and CUET PG exams. In addition to this, the university also conducted the NCET exam for admission to its Integrated BA-B.Ed, Integrated BSc-B.Ed courses. faqs.answer: A:    The application fee of MCA for all category candidates is INR 300. Students can pay the application fee online while registering for the course. In addition to the application and tiotion fee, there are several other components included in the overall fee structure for MCA. The details of the component-wise fee can be obtained from the official brochure, some of the components which are part of the overall MBA course fee include registration fee, matriculation fee, sports fund, medical examination/ facilities fund, library fund, computer lab fund, amenities development fund, students’ welfare fund and caution deposit (refundable), among various others. Read more about Pondicherry University MCA here.

The aforementioned tuition fee is is indicative. Some of the components which are the part MBA course fee include registration fee, matriculation fee, sports fund and development fund.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Material Science and Technology - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Best for students who like the B.Tech and make connections with different countries students.

review_content.Placements: First of all, yours is the 2nd batch in this university. Before that, there was M. Tech for the last 2 years, and they started B.Tech, which is good. Coming to the placement part, it's quite good, not below average. Compared to other universities, this is a central university, so it's good in that case. I have no idea about the highest package place, but I have heard that the highest is 40 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Coming to facilities and infrastructure, it's very good for our department, which has a newly designed building with an AI sensor corridor light, which was used from 2015. The hostel is good with very well furnished rooms and the best maintenance and cleaning all around the campus, not only in the toilets. Mess food is good for what we are paying, like we are paying, and the canteen service is very good. Medical is next-level full fee, with well-maintained hygiene, and also 24/7. Sports and games are also available with very good grounds and a stadium.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is a nice place to build our career.

review_content.Placements: Placements are quite good. My seniors are getting placed in Wabag, Chennai. Some other good companies also hire students. Packages offered are quite good for those who have nice company. For internships, faculty members will give permission to some of the popular institutes and industries.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. The network connection is quite poor, to be honest. We have library facilities. Our college conducts tournaments every year for all sports. Inter-college matches are available for all sports. The canteen food is below average.

As per Pondicherry University first merit list 2023, the cutoff score for an MA in Human Rights and Inclusive Policy course was 116 for the General All India category students. In 2022, the cutoff score stood at 167 for the MA in Human Rights and Inclusive Policy programme. So, considering the cutoff trend of Pondicherry University MA in Human Rights, yes 120 is a good rank for the General category student.
faqs.question: Q: Is 120 a good score in CUET PG for Pondicherry University MA in Human Rights and Inclusive Policy course?

faqs.answer: Under the BSc programme, Pondicherry University offers various specialisations. These specialisations are distributed amongst the university’s affiliated colleges. Thus, each course may have different eligibility criteria depending on the college. However, the common eligibility criterion is a pass in Class 12.
faqs.question: Q: Who is eligible to apply for BSc at Pondicherry University?

faqs.answer: Admission to a majority of postgraduate and integrated postgraduate level courses at Pondicherry University is subject to CUET UG and CUET PG exams. In addition to this, the university also conducted the NCET exam for admission to its Integrated BA-B.Ed, Integrated BSc-B.Ed courses. Candidates seeking admission to Pondicherry University can apply for these exams and then apply to the university with a valid score.
faqs.question: Q: Can I join Pondicherry University without entrance exam?

faqs.answer: Yes, Pondicherry University offers a UG-level BTech programme. Under this programme, the students get to choose from various specialisations, including, Computer Science & Engineering, Energy Engineering, Material Science & Technology and Electronics & Communication Engineering. All these courses are offered for a duration of four years and in full-time mode. Candidates seeking admission must have a valid score in the CUET examination.

course_faqs.question: Is MCA available at Pondicherry University?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, Pondicherry University offers a three-year MCA programme spread over six semesters. The course is available at the Department of Computer Science of the Puducherry campus and at the Department of Computer Science of the Karaikal campus of Pondicherry University. A total of 125 seats are available combined at both campuses out of which 75 are available at the Puducherry campus while the remaining 50 are offered at the Karaikal campus.

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for MCA at Pondicherry University?
overview_faqs.answer: The application fee of MCA for all category candidates is INR 300. Students can pay the application fee online while registering for the course. In addition to the application and tiotion fee, there are several other components included in the overall fee structure for MCA. The details of the component-wise fee can be obtained from the official brochure, some of the components which are part of the overall MBA course fee include registration fee, matriculation fee, sports fund, medical examination/ facilities fund, library fund, computer lab fund, amenities development fund, students’ welfare fund and caution deposit (refundable), among various others. Read more about Pondicherry University MCA here.

overview_faqs.question: Does Pondicherry University provide Distance Education to the students?
overview_faqs.answer: Apart from the full-time programmes, the University offers distance education programmes in the field of Management, Commerce, Arts, Business Administration and more. Admission to all these programmes is done on the basis of merit.BBA and BCom are offered at the UG level. The course duration of both programmes is three years. Candidates who have done Class 12 can apply for these programmes. The final selection of students is based on the HSC scores.Apart from the UG programmes, the University offers three PG programmes under distance education. MCom, MA and MBA are offered with a course duration of two years. A candidate must hold a bachelor’s degree in the relevant stream to be eligible for these programmes. The final selection of students will be based on the graduation scores.

overview_faqs.question: How expensive is MBA at Pondicherry University?
overview_faqs.answer: The tuition fee for MBA at Pondicherry University is between INR 24,930 and INR 2.4 lakh. Students should also pay a registration fee of INR 300 while filling the application form. The aforementioned tuition fee is is indicative. Some of the components which are the part MBA course fee include registration fee, matriculation fee, sports fund and development fund.

review_summary.college_name: Pondicherry University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Statistics - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Pondicherry University is gorgeous.

content.Placements: Since there hasn't been any batch that has completed their graduation after the university started following the new NEP guidelines, there haven't been any placements made yet. Prior to the implementation of the NEP guidelines, the average package that students got from statistics was around 4 LPA-6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities available right now have been used for a long time and haven't been updated yet in classrooms and labs. But the medical facilities are good, with proper canteens available across the campus. Wi-Fi provided is of good quality in certain places, reaching even up to 16 Mbps/sec.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Great place to study, but still, there is way more that can be improved.

content.Placements: The UG programme for our course has just started 2years back, so none of the batch has been placed yet. Though the Master's programme in this course has started long back, and the placements are below average, I feel. Not sure if the same applies to UG students as well.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is huge and spread across 800 acres. We have all the amenities, including all the required labs, proper classrooms for students, seminar halls, and conference rooms. Hostel mess provides hygienic and nutritious food all the 3 times a day. The menu is well planned, including a proper diet. We also have a health centre where health services are provided free of cost.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Material Science and Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Best for students who like the B.Tech and make connections with different countries students.

content.Placements: First of all, yours is the 2nd batch in this university. Before that, there was M. Tech for the last 2 years, and they started B.Tech, which is good. Coming to the placement part, it's quite good, not below average. Compared to other universities, this is a central university, so it's good in that case. I have no idea about the highest package place, but I have heard that the highest is 40 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Coming to facilities and infrastructure, it's very good for our department, which has a newly designed building with an AI sensor corridor light, which was used from 2015. The hostel is good with very well furnished rooms and the best maintenance and cleaning all around the campus, not only in the toilets. Mess food is good for what we are paying, like we are paying, and the canteen service is very good. Medical is next-level full fee, with well-maintained hygiene, and also 24/7. Sports and games are also available with very good grounds and a stadium.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a nice place to build our career.

content.Placements: Placements are quite good. My seniors are getting placed in Wabag, Chennai. Some other good companies also hire students. Packages offered are quite good for those who have nice company. For internships, faculty members will give permission to some of the popular institutes and industries.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. The network connection is quite poor, to be honest. We have library facilities. Our college conducts tournaments every year for all sports. Inter-college matches are available for all sports. The canteen food is below average.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Disaster Management - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: No placement. Friendly faculty members.

content.Placements: There is no placement after the course completion. We need to find our own jobs. After the completion of the course, you will get a Pondicherry University Certificate. After this course, learn any other skills like GIS, Python, etc. It will be helpful. Experience is required for a high-earning job in this field. Start from the DDMA, and we get a job.
content.Infrastructure: There is less equipment, and some equipment does not work properly. The department has one smartboard and Wi-Fi connection. There is a common library for the college. The food was average. The mess is contract-based, every year, it changes. Inside, there is a hostel committee and a campus committee, which conduct programmes, etc. There is a small ground in the hostel for throwball, cricket, football, etc.

admission_process.title: Pondicherry University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Pondicherry University admission 2025is open for all courses. The university offers various integrated PG, postgraduate, and doctoral-level programmes in the fields ofScience,Arts,Management,Commerce,Law,among others. All these courses are offered via the 57 departments under it. Admission to a majority of UG and PG courses atPondicherry Universityis subject toCUET UGandCUET PGexams.

Pondicherry Universityalso conducted the NCET exam for admission to its four-year Integrated Teacher Education Programme (ITEP) BA-B.Ed, Integrated BSc-B.Ed courses. Interested students can apply for these exams and then apply to the university with a valid score. The University also runs a special programme, calledStudy in India Programme (SIP)forinternational students. SIP offers both semester and short-term programmes only for international students based on the requirements of foreign universities. Want to know more about Pondicherry University admission, course-wise eligibility, selection criteria, fees, seat intake and admission process:
Check the below infographic for Pondicherry University admission process:

Pondicherry University offers admission to UG and PG courses based on entrance exam scores. The university offers all the courses in regular mode. The key highlights ofPondicherry University Admissions 2025are mentioned in the below table:
Admission 2025 status

Pondicherry University admission is open to courses via CUET. Aspirants seeking admission to the flagship MBA programme must check their eligibility and appear for the CUET PG entrance exam. The NTA has releasedCUET PG 2025 resultson its official website forPondicherry University MBA admission 2025.

Candidates seeking admission to Pondicherry University courses are required to meet the eligibility criteria of their desired courses and then appear for the selection process determined by the University. The basic eligibility for all UG and PG courses is class 12 and graduation, respectively and the selection for most of the UG and PG courses is done based on CUET. Interested candidates can check out the below table forpopular Pondicherry University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection:
UG degree with 50% aggregate
UG degree in Computer Applications/ CS/ IT OR any other UG degree with Maths/ Statistics/ Commerce/ Business subjects with a minimum of 55% marks from a recognised university
Relevant BE/ BTech degree with 55% aggregate
A relevant PG degree with at least 55% aggregate
University-level entrance test
To check out the admission process for otherPondicherry University courses, make your course selection here
*The information mentioned above is sourced from official sources. Additionally, BEd is not available at the campus of Pondicherry University but is available at the colleges affiliated with it.
Download now:Pondicherry University Affiliated Colleges

ThePondicherry University course feestructure is inclusive of various components such as admission fees, tuition fees, caution deposits, etc. Some of these components are paid only once during the entire course duration and some are paid every year or semester-wise.

Affordability is one of the major reasons why so many students leave a degree or a college. The availability of scholarships and education loans has made education accessible. However, the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Interested candidates can checkPondicherry University's ROIfrom the below table containing fees and average package :
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Pondicherry University seatallocation for various UG and PG courses is done through CUET counselling. The total seat intake of Pondicherry University includes seat intake at affiliated colleges. Interested candidates can check out the table below forPondicherry University seat intake:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Pondicherry Universityconducted the NCET exam for admission to its four-year Integrated programme such as BA-B.Ed, Integrated BSc-B.Ed courses. Interested students can apply for these exams and then apply to the university with a valid score. Further, for UG and PG courses the University offers admission based onCUET-UGandCUET-PG. For admission to various UG and PG courses at Pondicherry University, students need to follow an admission process that consists of mainly four steps. Find them below:
Step 1: Register for Pondicherry University UG Counselling via CUET UG
Step 2: Merit List Release and Document Verification upon Selection:Display of merit list on Pondicherry University's official website.
Step 3: Confirmation of Admission:To confirm admission students can make admission fee payments to secure their seat.

faqs.question: Is MCA available at Pondicherry University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Pondicherry University offers a three-year MCA programme spread over six semesters. The course is available at the Department of Computer Science of the Puducherry campus and at the Department of Computer Science of the Karaikal campus of Pondicherry University. A total of 125 seats are available combined at both campuses out of which 75 are available at the Puducherry campus while the remaining 50 are offered at the Karaikal campus.

faqs.question: How can I get a seat in Pondicherry University's MCA programme?
faqs.answer: MCA admissions at Pondicherry University were based on a university-level entrance exam until 2021. However, starting 2022, the university started accepting students via the CUET PG entrance exam. Those who appear and qualify the exam are allotted a seat for the three-year MCA at the Pondicherry University campus and affiliated colleges via university-level counselling. faqs.question: Can I join Pondicherry University without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Admission to a majority of postgraduate and integrated postgraduate level courses at Pondicherry University is subject to CUET UG and CUET PG exams. In addition to this, the university also conducted the NCET exam for admission to its Integrated BA-B.Ed, Integrated BSc-B.Ed courses. Candidates seeking admission to Pondicherry University can apply for these exams and then apply to the university with a valid score.

faqs.question: Is BSc available in Pondicherry University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Pondicherry University offers a BSc programme with various courses spread across its affiliated colleges. The main campus of the university offers five-year MSc integrated courses for students wanting to pursue PG-integrated courses. Moreover, students seeking admission in regular three-year BSc courses can do so by applying at Pondicherry University’s affiliated colleges.

faqs.question: Does Pondicherry University provide Distance Education to the students?
faqs.answer: Apart from the full-time programmes, the University offers distance education programmes in the field of Management, Commerce, Arts, Business Administration and more. Admission to all these programmes is done on the basis of merit.BBA and BCom are offered at the UG level. The course duration of both programmes is three years. Candidates who have done Class 12 can apply for these programmes. The final selection of students is based on the HSC scores.Apart from the UG programmes, the University offers three PG programmes under distance education. MCom, MA and MBA are offered with a course duration of two years. A candidate must hold a bachelor’s degree in the relevant stream to be eligible for these programmes. The final selection of students will be based on the graduation scores.

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for BSc at Pondicherry University?
faqs.answer: Under the BSc programme, Pondicherry University offers various specialisations. These specialisations are distributed amongst the university’s affiliated colleges. Thus, each course may have different eligibility criteria depending on the college. However, the common eligibility criterion is a pass in Class 12.

faqs.question: Which skills do I need to acquire while pursuing B.A (H) course from Pondicherry University to get my dream job?
faqs.answer: Students who wish to get a good job after completing their degree must enhance their skill set while pursuing the programme. A BA course helps students cultivate knowledge of various domains such as Psychology, Sociology, History, English and more. However, most of it is theoretical knowledge. Employers often prefer students who showcase a set of both knowledge and employability skills. Listed below are some of the skills demanded in today’s corporate world: Digital Marketing HR Analytics Public Administration Foreign Language Graphic Designing Public Relations Management

faqs.question: What is the application fee for MCA at Pondicherry University?
faqs.answer: The application fee of MCA for all category candidates is INR 300. Students can pay the application fee online while registering for the course. In addition to the application and tiotion fee, there are several other components included in the overall fee structure for MCA. The details of the component-wise fee can be obtained from the official brochure, some of the components which are part of the overall MBA course fee include registration fee, matriculation fee, sports fund, medical examination/ facilities fund, library fund, computer lab fund, amenities development fund, students’ welfare fund and caution deposit (refundable), among various others. Read more about Pondicherry University MCA here .

faqs.question: How expensive is MBA at Pondicherry University?
faqs.answer: The tuition fee for MBA at Pondicherry University is between INR 24,930 and INR 2.4 lakh . Students should also pay a registration fee of INR 300 while filling the application form. The aforementioned tuition fee is is indicative. Some of the components which are the part MBA course fee include registration fee, matriculation fee, sports fund and development fund.

faqs.question: What is the total fee for Pondicherry University BSc course?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Pondicherry University BSc courses is INR 1,100 to 1.1 lakh as per official sources. However, it is still subject to changes. Hence, it is, indicative. Apart from this, the fee structure for Pondicherry University courses contains various other fee components such as Registration & Processing Fee, Study Material & Handling Charges, Matriculation Fee, etc. Students are advised to visit the official site of the university to find out the detailed fee structure.

highlights.description: Consistently recognised by numerous national and international ranking agencies, Pondicherry University is one of India’s top institutes. Recently, the institute ranked #151-200 in the NIRF 2025 under the Overall category, and #101-150 under University. The reasons for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies include its academic reputation, top-notch faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The following article covers all the information around Pondicherry University rankings:

Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Pondicherry In 2025

nirf.description:
Pondicherry University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Pondicherry University fell 50 ranks to #151 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated stability in trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Pondicherry University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the Pondicherry University latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:

outlook.description:
Based on the rankings from Outlook, Pondicherry University outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the Outlook ranking system.
In the 'MBA (Government)' category, the rankings of the institute have demonstrated a decreasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2024, Pondicherry University fell 1 rank to #12 rank in the 'MBA (Government)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

qs_world.description:
According to the rankings from QS World University Rankings, Pondicherry University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. Pondicherry University's rankings in 'Top Global Universities' category have shown stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2026, Pondicherry University's rank is #1201, the same as last year's rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'Asia' category have shown an increasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, Pondicherry University climbed 31 ranks to #470 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The 'Southern Asia' category rankings of the institute have shown an increasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, Pondicherry University climbed 19 ranks to #121 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: Pondicherry University  Infrastructure: Campus Facilities

hostel.description: Pondicherry University has 17 hostels in the campus, out of which 11 are for men, 5 for women students/research scholars and 1 for foreign students. SC/ST students and all women  students are exempted from payment of room rent. Differently-abled students are provided free accommodation and food. The University has well furnished AC and non AC facilities for the foreign students to stay in C.V.Raman hostel for boys (50 rooms) and Madame Curie hostel for girls (50 rooms).

cafeteria.description:
Three different canteens at campus cater to the palate of the cross section of students, faculty, staff and visitors of the University as follows: Canteen 1 and Canteen 2 serves south indian food at reasonable rates and it is Open from 9 am to 5.30 pm. and Canteen 3 specializes in North Indian Cuisine however they also serve South Indian meals and Chinese cuisine at reasonable rates with special offers from time to time, this air conditioned canteen opens from 8:00 am to 10:30 pm.
Also Three Coffee Bars of Fresh & Honest Breweries are functioning at Science Complex, Cauvery girls hostel & Kamban boys hostel. A Ponlait Bunks sells Milk and milk products in the University

reviews.review_heading: Pondicherry University is gorgeous.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available right now have been used for a long time and haven't been updated yet in classrooms and labs. But the medical facilities are good, with proper canteens available across the campus. Wi-Fi provided is of good quality in certain places, reaching even up to 16 Mbps/sec.

reviews.review_heading: Great place to study, but still, there is way more that can be improved.
reviews.review_text: The campus is huge and spread across 800 acres. We have all the amenities, including all the required labs, proper classrooms for students, seminar halls, and conference rooms. Hostel mess provides hygienic and nutritious food all the 3 times a day. The menu is well planned, including a proper diet. We also have a health centre where health services are provided free of cost.

reviews.review_heading: Best for students who like the B.Tech and make connections with different countries students.
reviews.review_text: Coming to facilities and infrastructure, it's very good for our department, which has a newly designed building with an AI sensor corridor light, which was used from 2015. The hostel is good with very well furnished rooms and the best maintenance and cleaning all around the campus, not only in the toilets. Mess food is good for what we are paying, like we are paying, and the canteen service is very good. Medical is next-level full fee, with well-maintained hygiene, and also 24/7. Sports and game...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Pondicherry Engineering College - PECReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is a nice place to build our career.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. The network connection is quite poor, to be honest. We have library facilities. Our college conducts tournaments every year for all sports. Inter-college matches are available for all sports. The canteen food is below average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Pondicherry University - Port Blair CampusReviewed on 15 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: No placement. Friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is less equipment, and some equipment does not work properly. The department has one smartboard and Wi-Fi connection. There is a common library for the college. The food was average. The mess is contract-based, every year, it changes. Inside, there is a hostel committee and a campus committee, which conduct programmes, etc. There is a small ground in the hostel for throwball, cricket, football, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Pondicherry Engineering College - PECReviewed on 7 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It's a decent university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent. Some lab equipment needs to be upgraded. The classrooms are spacious and neat. There is a dispensary within the campus grounds with a nurse and a doctor always on call during working hours. The library has a good collection of books that can be used for reference. The sports and games area is also decent.

reviews.review_heading: Placements, infrastructure, courses in PU.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and hostel are good. There are Wi-Fi classrooms, main and department libraries, and labs. The mess food is average and worth the price. Health facility is available 24/7. Facilities available for sports include an indoor court and stadiums.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Pondicherry Institute of Medical Sciences,Reviewed on 13 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Pondicherry Institute of Medical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available here, like Wi-Fi, and each department has a separate lab and demo room. The central library is there with lakhs of medical and paramedical books. Sports are the main pillar of the college. They train in basketball, volleyball, football, hockey, cricket, throwball, etc., for both girls and boys. The gym is also there for both girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: I truly love my university.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi connection all over our campus, which is free to use. We have separate classrooms for all the year students. We have two or more washrooms for each. In the hostel, we have two washrooms on the same floor, and we have two drying areas and water filters as well.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Pondicherry Institute of Medical Sciences,Reviewed on 24 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: PIMS: A student-friendly college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is a very special thing in our college because it's full of well-equipped facilities and also has a good campus life. We have AI labs, VR labs, and all departments have their separate labs. We also have Wi-Fi computers in the library and world-class books. Hostels are separate for girls and boys, and we have a big playground as well as separate courts for volleyball, throwball, badminton, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sri Manakula Vinayagar Engineering College - SMVECReviewed on 23 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Experience in my college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course are Wi-Fi, with full speed and 24/7 availability. Labs are very big, and all resources are available. Classrooms are big and well-cleaned with digital boards. A well-stocked library is present with all resources available.

reviews.review_heading: Good and better university.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are always available in the department for any enquiries. We have Wi-Fi, computer labs and a library. We have a good hostel with fans Wi-Fi and water cooler. Mess food is good quality and we have a health center and games etc.

reviews.review_heading: Placement records in 2025 and university life at Pondicherry University.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi works properly in the library and department, but in the hostel, it’s a little slow. Classrooms are well furnished, and some classrooms have AC. Lab computers are a little outdated nowadays. In a hostel room, there is triple sharing, with not much space. Mess food is not good, but canteen food is good and affordable. A normal fever can be cured in the university health center. For games, grounds are there, but not in A1 condition.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2019Offered by Pondicherry Engineering College - PECReviewed on 6 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good for a engineering college. ATM and a bank inside the college. There was a garden that contained a good space for entertainment. Labs were spacious and had a good number of pc. Classrooms were spacious and digitally updated. The hostel was good. Mess food was average. There was a cricket ground volleyball court badminton court and indoor playground available.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college. You had to achieve this college with a good rank.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good. The campus was green. Wi-Fi was available all over the campus with CCTV security. Hostels were good and were 2-seated. Labs were spacious and had all apparatus used in the industry. Classrooms were spacious and digitally updated. The library was good and open at night.

college_info.college_name: Reliance Education : VFX and Animation Academy: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
Reliance Education VFX and Animation Academy nurture the future leaders of moving art. The academy is counted amongst the top institutes offering VFX and animation courses in India. It maintains centres in Mumbai, Delhi, Kolkata, Chennai, Bangalore, Pune, Hyderabad, Ahmedabad, Lucknow, Patna, Chandigarh, Bhubaneswar, Cochin, Noida, Varanasi, Gurugram, Nagpur, Agra, Mathura, Kannur, Aurangabad, Meerut, Bhilai, Alwar and Kanpur.

Some of the popular vocational courses offered by Reliance Education include Triple Programme in VFX, Advanced Programme in VFX, Triple Programme in Animation, Advanced Programme in Animation, Programme in Maya Master, Programme in TV Cartoon Animation with 3D, Programme in VFX Film Making, Programme in Advanced Maya with Film Fundamentals, Graphic Plus & Web Plus and Game Testing. Besides professional programmes, Reliance Education offers preparatory courses for various entrance examinations including NIFT, NID, CEED and MIT Institute of Design.

The animation and VFX films made by Reliance Education have been awarded and nominated in various film festivals like FICCI - BAF Awards, Kolkata Shorts International Film Festival, Delhi Shorts International Film Festival, Dada Saheb Phalke Film Festival, Goa Short Film Festival and FTII National Student's Film Festival.

Admission to the programmes offered at Reliance Education VFX and Animation Academy is done through lateral entry. Students must have the minimum required qualifications for the respective courses they want to pursue.

Students of Reliance Education VFX and Animation Academy are absorbed by leading studios including Reliance Entertainment, Maya Digital Studio, Xentric Studios, Tata ELXSI, Symbiosis Technologies, HMX Studios and R Media. Further, Reliance Education has partnered with Discovery Communication India for animated film production. Students of Reliance Education VFX and Animation Academy are recruited in various roles like Pre Production Artist, 3D FX Artist, Storyboard Artist, Character Designer, Roto Artist, Editor, Animator, CGI Compositor, Virtual Production Developer, Product Demo Artist, 3D AR-VR Background Artist, Modelling Artist, Texturing Artist and 3D Modelling Artist.

placements.overview:
Reliance Education VFX and Animation Academy nurture the future leaders of moving art. The academy is counted amongst the top institutes offering VFX and animation courses in India. It maintains centres in Mumbai, Delhi, Kolkata, Chennai, Bangalore, Pune, Hyderabad, Ahmedabad, Lucknow, Patna, Chandigarh, Bhubaneswar, Cochin, Noida, Varanasi, Gurugram, Nagpur, Agra, Mathura, Kannur, Aurangabad, Meerut, Bhilai, Alwar and Kanpur.

Some of the popular vocational courses offered by Reliance Education include Triple Programme in VFX, Advanced Programme in VFX, Triple Programme in Animation, Advanced Programme in Animation, Programme in Maya Master, Programme in TV Cartoon Animation with 3D, Programme in VFX Film Making, Programme in Advanced Maya with Film Fundamentals, Graphic Plus & Web Plus and Game Testing. Besides professional programmes, Reliance Education offers preparatory courses for various entrance examinations including NIFT, NID, CEED and MIT Institute of Design.

Reliance Education : VFX and Animation Academy was founded in 2009. It is a private institute and is located in Noida, Uttar Pradesh. Reliance Education : VFX and Animation Academy courses are offered to students at the Certificate levels. The institute offers courses in Part Time mode. Reliance Education : VFX and Animation Academy offers a total of 34 courses in streams such as IT & Software, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Animation and Aviation. Some of the popular course offered at the institute is Certificate. This course is offered to students across several specialisations such as 3DS Max, Fashion Design, Final Cut Pro and Maya. Apart from this, the Reliance Education : VFX and Animation Academy campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Reliance Education : VFX and Animation Academy offers a wide range of programmes to students at the Certificate level. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as IT & Software, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ) and Design. At the Certificate level, the college offers courses such as Certificate. Reliance Education : VFX and Animation Academy courses are offered to students in Part Time mode.

reviews_list.batch_info: Program in VFX Film Making - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it is a good institute for VFX and animation.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are good but not the best because they just left us on our own, and they helped us in few things. But that's enough for us to get a job in a huge international company. Few students got placed in new startup companies of India. Few students did not get the job.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good in the previous institute. The new institute is not what I expected, but anyways it is better for people who travel from a long distance, and it is average. The canteen is very small, and the other stuff is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Advanced Program in Animation - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides average placements.

review_content.Placements: Placements are average and aren't worth it. Placements are offered in India only. Those are freelancing options. Most students got placements, and some work as freelancers. Placements are helpful and useful.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has classrooms. It has satisfactory facilities. It doesn't have hostel facilities.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers aren't even average when it comes to teaching. They only teach the basics, and we have to do the rest on our own. They clear up our doubts. Exams are conducted normally as it is necessary to test the knowledge and efficiency of students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Advanced Program in Animation - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Won't recommend this.

review_content.Placements: Placement are not upto mark as compared to other reliance institute of same branch. There were no internship provided. Have to search of my own. Zero % of students were placed from college. There were no companies that came to campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: There was no proper infrastructure. College was combined with nursing college of other institute, there were no hostel in college. Wi-Fi was there but never working. There was no canteen in college. Seriously no canteen. Labs were good. But animation lab where we learnt were not upto mark.

college_info.intro: UPES - Experience Centre, at the UG level, offers BA, BBA, BDes, and other courses to students. At the PG level, the university provides MA, MTech, and other courses to students. UPES University Delhi is famous for its BTech and MBA courses. BTech and MBA students are placed in top companies such as HUL, Microsoft, Adobe, Genpact, PwC, and others. These courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by UPES (Admission Office) and their respective eligibility and fees:

faqs.answer: A:    UPES (Admission Office) accepts various entrance exam scores for admission to different courses. For B.Tech. admissions, the university accepts UPESEAT, JEE, Board Merit, SAT, and CUET scores. For MBA admissions, the university accepts CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, NMAT, and UPESMET scores. Admission to M.Des. and B.Des. courses is based on the valid score of CEED or UPES DAT followed by a presentation and interview. BBA admission is done through UPESMET-UG and through National Level Tests. Admission for LLB courses is based on the score of ULSAT or CLAT/LSAT scores. The eligibility criteria and minimum marks required for different courses can be found on the UPES website
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by UPES (Admission Office) for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, candidates who complete Class 10 and Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate can apply for BBA course at UPES - Experience Centre. The selection criteria for the course is UPESMET UG/UGAT/CUET UG/Merit + PI, PI + SOP (Global BBA). Candidates whose score less than 50% in Class 12 are not eleigible for admission.
faqs.question: Can I get into UPES - Experience Centre BBA with 70% in class 12th?

faqs.answer: A:    No, the UPES - Experience Centredoes not accept the MAT score for MBA admissions. On the other hand, the UPES School of Business does accept the MAT score, with a minimum eligible MAT/CMAT 2024 score of 70 percentile exempting students from the UPES Management Entrance Test. Therefore, if you have a MAT score and are considering applying for an MBA at UPES, the School of Business would be the appropriate choice for your application.
faqs.question: Does UPES - Experience Centre accept MAT score?

faqs.answer: A:    The Answer to your question is that, In UPES Different MBA specializations require MAT/CMAT score of 75 or 80 percentile, or CAT/XAT of 70 or 75 percentile. If you're applying through NMAT, the minimum score required is 140. Examination Pathway – Apply for UPES Management Entrance Test (UPESMET) to take admission in MBA Programme.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does UPES (Admission Office) accept for admission to MBA?

review_content.General: Almost every student got placed. Most of them got IT companies like IBM, Infosys, Microsoft, Tech Mahindra, etc. The average package was around 3 LPA but I can't exactly remember the highest and lowest salaries offered. Companies offered different roles to the students like senior analysts, sales engineers, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the university is very good. Surroundings of the college are with forests and are pollution-free. The college has 10 blocks, several labs, a library, an energy house, an administration department and separate hostels inside the campus. The college is 10 km away from Dehradun city. Natural beauty can be seen everywhere around the college. Wi-fi has a good speed with good medical facilities, sports and games available. The university owns a cricket stadium.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Geo Science Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: University with a great faculty, excellent placements and really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Placement of the University of Petroleum and Energy Studies is very good. Placement was nearly 90% in our batch. Companies from different domains visited the campus and students got selected with appropriate salary packages and job profiles. Joining letters were offered to students at a proper time and companies that visited also showed an interest towards summer internships of third-year students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is situated in Dehradun, at the foot of the Himalayas which provide the best environment for students to learn. The college has great Wi-Fi, labs of all specialised domains, classrooms equipped with the latest technology, the library is full of quality study material in adequate quantity and also provides online access. Medical facilities of the campus are upgrading since the beginning and the availability of doctor and emergency equipment fulfils the medical facilities. Adequate sports facilities in different areas like cricket, table tennis, basketball, volleyball etc. are there. Hostels are very hygienic and approachable. The quality of food on campus is very good.

courses.overview: UPES Delhi Courses & Fees 2025 UPES (Admission Office) offers UG and PG level courses. The university offers programmes in Engineering. Aspirants pursuing these courses from UPES Delhi are open to career opportunities in the respective fields. Check below the fees, eligibility and selection criteria for the courses:

fee_structure.heading: UPES Delhi Courses & Fees 2025
fee_structure.overview: UPES (Admission Office) offers UG and PG level courses. The university offers programmes in Engineering. Aspirants pursuing these courses from UPES Delhi are open to career opportunities in the respective fields. Check below the fees, eligibility and selection criteria for the courses:

faqs.answer: Yes, it is worth pursuing BTech at UPES Delhi as the university is recognised as the Scientific and Research Organisation by DISR, the Ministry of Science Technology, and the Government of India. The university is a member of the AIU, International Association of Universities, and World Design Organisation. UPES has also been accredited with an A Grade by NAAC and is ranked 42 under the Engineering category by NIRF 2024.
faqs.question: Q: Is it worth pursuing B.Tech at UPES Delhi?

faqs.answer: Yes, candidates who have passed Class 10 and Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate and a minimum of 50% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry, Maths/ Biology, and English in Class 12 can apply for BTech/ BTech (Hons) course with JEE Main or CUET score. Aspirants must secure at least 50 percentile for admission to through SAT India score. For aspirants who wish to apply with their merit in the last qualifying exam must pass Class 10 and Class 12 with at least 75%-80% aggregate and a minimum of 75%-80% aggregate in Class 12 PCM subjects.In case a candidate has not appeared for any of the specified exam, he or she can appear for UPESEAT. As soon as the selection round is over, aspirants will need to prove their eligibility by provding necessary documents for verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university. UPES BTech fee ranges between INR 9.46 Lacs and INR 18.32 Lacs as per an unofficial source. The fee is calculated based on tuition fee and does not includes other fee components.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get admission at UPES Dehradun institute for BTech course after class 12?

faqs.answer: The UPES Admission Office is not a department for studying but rather a administrative unit responsible for handling admissions-related processes and inquiries from prospective students. Therefore, you do not study within the Admission Office itself.When you enroll at UPES and become a student, you will study within one of UPES's academic schools or departments, depending on the programme or field of study you choose. UPES offers a wide range of academic programs in areas such as engineering, business, law, design, and more. Your experience as a student at UPES will depend on the specific school or department you are part of, the faculty, curriculum, resources, and facilities available.
faqs.question: Q: How is UPES (Admission Office) for studying?

faqs.answer: UPES Dehradun admission to MBA course is based on either UPESMET/ CAT/ CUET PG scores. In case, an aspirant fails to secure the minimum marks specified by the university, he or she will need to appear for UPESMET. For admission to Global MBA, aspirants only need to come for the PI round. The shortlisted candidates will be called for group discussion and personal interview round for further selection. After completion of the selection rounds, aspirants will need to prove their eligibility by provding necessary documents for verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth pursuing B.Tech at UPES Delhi?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, it is worth pursuing BTech at UPES Delhi as the university is recognised as the Scientific and Research Organisation by DISR, the Ministry of Science Technology, and the Government of India. The university is a member of the AIU, International Association of Universities, and World Design Organisation. UPES has also been accredited with an A Grade by NAAC and is ranked 42 under the Engineering category by NIRF 2024.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth doing BBA from UPES - Experience Centre?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, it is worth doing BBA from UPES - Experience Centre. UPES University is one of the popular universities in India. UPES Expirence Centra is approved by UGC and was established in 2003 through the UPES Act (2003) of the State Legislature of Uttrakhand. UPES has campuses in Dehradun and UPES - Experience Centre is located in Delhi. Some of the courses provided by the university are approved by the Bar Council of India, and the Pharmacy Council of India. Some of the courses are accredited by (IACBE), USA, and NBA.

overview_faqs.question: How is UPES (Admission Office) for studying?
overview_faqs.answer: The UPES Admission Office is not a department for studying but rather a administrative unit responsible for handling admissions-related processes and inquiries from prospective students. Therefore, you do not study within the Admission Office itself.When you enroll at UPES and become a student, you will study within one of UPES's academic schools or departments, depending on the programme or field of study you choose. UPES offers a wide range of academic programs in areas such as engineering, business, law, design, and more. Your experience as a student at UPES will depend on the specific school or department you are part of, the faculty, curriculum, resources, and facilities available.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth doing BBA from UPES?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, it is worth doing BBA from UPES. UPES University is one of the popular universities in India. UPES Dehradun is approved by UGC and was established in 2003 through the UPES Act (2003) of the State Legislature of Uttrakhand. UPES has campuses in Dehradun and UPES (Admission Office) is located in Delhi. Some of the courses provided by the university are approved by the Bar Council of India, and the Pharmacy Council of India. Some of the courses are accredited by (IACBE), USA, and NBA.

review_summary.college_name: UPES - Experience Centre Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Geo Science Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Nice faculty and decent infrastructure.

content.Placements: The placements here at UPES are fine around 80 percent of the students in our senior batches are placed in well reputed companies. The highest package that is offered to a geo Science student is around 12 to 14 Lacs and the lowest is around 3 Lacs to a student.
content.Infrastructure: The college has its own Wi-Fi named UPESNET. The labs here have a separate department named as R&D department where are the labs are present. Here the canteen is fine with hygienic food and the classrooms are big enough for 70 students and we have a huge library of 3 floors.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Geo Science Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with faculty, good placements, very good infrastructure, facilities, etc.

content.Placements: Almost every student got placed. Most of them got IT companies like IBM, Infosys, Microsoft, Tech Mahindra, etc. The average package was around 3 LPA but I can't exactly remember the highest and lowest salaries offered. Companies offered different roles to the students like senior analysts, sales engineers, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the university is very good. Surroundings of the college are with forests and are pollution-free. The college has 10 blocks, several labs, a library, an energy house, an administration department and separate hostels inside the campus. The college is 10 km away from Dehradun city. Natural beauty can be seen everywhere around the college. Wi-fi has a good speed with good medical facilities, sports and games available. The university owns a cricket stadium.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Geo Science Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: University with a great faculty, excellent placements and really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Placement of the University of Petroleum and Energy Studies is very good. Placement was nearly 90% in our batch. Companies from different domains visited the campus and students got selected with appropriate salary packages and job profiles. Joining letters were offered to students at a proper time and companies that visited also showed an interest towards summer internships of third-year students.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is situated in Dehradun, at the foot of the Himalayas which provide the best environment for students to learn. The college has great Wi-Fi, labs of all specialised domains, classrooms equipped with the latest technology, the library is full of quality study material in adequate quantity and also provides online access. Medical facilities of the campus are upgrading since the beginning and the availability of doctor and emergency equipment fulfils the medical facilities. Adequate sports facilities in different areas like cricket, table tennis, basketball, volleyball etc. are there. Hostels are very hygienic and approachable. The quality of food on campus is very good.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Power Distribution (Smart Grids) - Batch of 2016

content.Other: M.Tech at University of Petroleum and Energy Studies, was a wonderful experience with huge and wonderful infrastructure built, knowledgeable faculty and placements as good as other same level colleges. Experience of studies into a campus surrounded by Mussoorie mountain ranges, away from polluted and noise cities, made the two years of graduation memorable.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Geo Science Engineering - Batch of 2015

content.Other: It is a very good university with great infrastructure, labs, facilities, teachers, and atmosphere. Placement is also very good. One who wants to take part in Sports University welcomes them. Culture and Technical fest are so amazing that one never miss them. University is offering specialization course in different fields. So it is a good University for those who want to make their career in specific field of petroleum, automotive and infrastructure.

UPES- Experience Centre - Experience Centre is approved by UGC and was established in 2003 through the UPES Act (2003) of the State Legislature of Uttrakhand. The main campus of UPES is in Uttarakhand which offers over 72 different UG, PG, and doctorate programmes in various streams such as Technology, Design, Management, Business Administration, Law, Computer Application, IT, and many more.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for the courses at UPES - Experience Centre?

faqs.answer: The Answer to your question is that, In UPES Different MBA specializations require MAT/CMAT score of 75 or 80 percentile, or CAT/XAT of 70 or 75 percentile. If you're applying through NMAT, the minimum score required is 140. Examination Pathway – Apply for UPES Management Entrance Test (UPESMET) to take admission in MBA Programme.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does UPES (Admission Office) accept for admission to MBA?

faqs.answer: Yes, MAT is required else the student need to give UPES Management Entrance exam to be eligible to get the admission. The qualifications required for the admissions are - Minimum 50% marks in Class X & XII and Graduation from a recognised University in any stream. Students having a minimum eligible MAT /CMAT 2024 score of 70 Percentile will be exempted from the UPES Management Entrance Test and will only be called for Group Discussion and Interview if qualified.

admission_process.title: UPES - Experience Centre Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Admission to UPES - Experience Centre is both merit & entrance-based. UPES - Experience Centre offers over 72 courses at the UG, PG, and PhD levels through nine schools and the UPES Centre for Continuing Education. The courses are offered in multiple streams like Engineering, Management, Science, Business, etc. Find below the UPES - Experience Centre admission process:

Stage 1: UPES - Experience Centre Online ApplicationThe application process is online. Candidates have to fill out the application form & pay the required application fee, which isINR 1,750for all courses, within the specified deadline.
Stage 2: Shortlisting of Candidates

Candidates are shortlisted based on their academic records and the relevant qualifications required for the particular course admission. The university admits students ased on various entrance exam score such as CAT/GATE/SAT India, etc.
Stage 3:Discussion on Executive Experience & PI
After shortlisting, candidates are required to participate in the discussion for evaluation for admission to the desired course. The candidates are also evaluated & examined for the chosen programme.
Stage 4: Admission Confirmation
After the interview, candidates will be able to secure admission and confirm their seats for the respective course by submitting the fees at the college.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to UPES - Experience Centre MBA course?
faqs.answer: UPES - Experience Centre admission to MBA course is based on either UPESMET/ CAT/ CUET PG scores. In case, an aspirant fails to secure the minimum marks specified by the university, he or she will need to appear for UPESMET. For admission to Global MBA, aspirants only need to come for the PI round. The shortlisted candidates will be called for group discussion and personal interview round for further selection. After completion of the selection rounds, aspirants will need to prove their eligibility by provding necessary documents for verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Is it difficult to get admission in School of Health Sciences and Technology Courses, UPES - Experience Centre?
faqs.answer: Admission to UPES - Experience Centre can vary in difficulty depending on the chosen admission pathway. There are three options available: UPSEAT (which covers 80% of seats), Board marks (for which exceptional scores are required), and JEE Main marks for All India seats. If you are aiming for admission through UPSEAT, it's generally considered more competitive, and you should aim for a rank of at least 600 in the exam to increase your chances of securing a spot at the college. The difficulty level of admission can also be influenced by factors such as the number of applicants and the specific programme you are applying to. It's advisable to research the admission criteria and requirements for your chosen course to understand the level of competitiveness involved.

faqs.question: Does UPES - Experience Centre accept MAT score?
faqs.answer: No, the UPES - Experience Centredoes not accept the MAT score for MBA admissions. On the other hand, the UPES School of Business does accept the MAT score, with a minimum eligible MAT/CMAT 2024 score of 70 percentile exempting students from the UPES Management Entrance Test. Therefore, if you have a MAT score and are considering applying for an MBA at UPES, the School of Business would be the appropriate choice for your application.

faqs.answer: The mode of application is online. placement_data.title: UPES - Experience Centre Placement overview 2024
paragraphs: The placements for UPES - Experience Centre are conducted at the central level of UPES Dehradun . As per the official placement report till May 2023, the highest package and average package offered to BTech (CSE) students during UPES Delhi placements 2023 were INR 36 LPA and INR 8.66 LPA, respectively. In addition, the placement rate recorded during placements 2023 was 94% .

Further, the highest package and average package offered to MBA students were INR 27.83 LPA and INR 8.12 LPA , respectively. The top recruiters of UPES Delhi in the past years were HUL, Microsoft, Adobe, Genpact, PwC , etc.
