reviews.review_heading: The college is almost satisfactory, mostly because of its location. It is a nice place to stay.
reviews.review_text: Our university is really great in terms of infrastructure. Labs are awesome, and you have a lot of options to explore. The food quality in canteen is very good there's also hostel facility available.

college_info.college_name: UPES - Experience Centre Scholarship Details

paragraphs: UPES - Experience Centre offers meritorious students a number of scholarships on the tuition fees to support their education. Students who wish to enroll in any course at UPES- Experience Centre will have to score a good percentage as part of the selection process. Apart from this, students should also meet other criteria that the University has chosen to avail the scholarship.

UPES - Experience Centre will provide a concession in fees based on scores scored by students in the entrance exam, such as JEE Main, JEE Advanced, CUET, CBSE (+2), and exams from other central/ State boards of India.
Candidates can check the UPES Experience Centre scholarship types given below:
Further, the university offers a wide range of scholarships to all students of the University. Some of the UPES- Experience Centre scholarship categories and their criteria are listed below:
1. Entry Level Scholarship
Category
Scholarship
Class 12 Marks (Overall)
JEE/ CUET
CUET
Girls Students
Category
Scholarship
Class 12 Marks (Overall)
JEE/ CUET
CUET
Boys Students
For Example: If a student scores 80.7% or 80.9% in class 12, his/her percentage will be rounded off to 80%, and will get a scholarship on tuition fees for 1st year only.
2. Scholarship for MBA students
Category
Criteria - Graduation overall marks
Waiver (in tuition fees)
Applicable for
All students
Minimum CGPA 7.5 or
Percentage – 75%
1st year only
Note:
3. Free Ships Scholarship

The UPES’ Free Ships Scholarships are built to uplift prospective students from low-income families without added clauses or strings attached. A total of 51 seats are allotted with an upper age limit of 20 years for UG programs and 25 years for PG programs - and are provided on both the tuition fee and hostel fee.
Image source: official website
4. Sports Scholarships

The University allotted 50 seats for sportspeople who excel in a range of sports from cricket, football, and athletics to shooting, chess, and table tennis; as it aims to make sports an inclusive part of the academic curriculum. The scholarship percentile under this impressive initiative ranges from 35% to 100% depending on the number of national & international sports achievements a candidate has.
Image source: official website
5. Academic Scholarship

This scholarship is applicable for both UG and PG students and for the second year onwards. The scholarship will be awarded to 10% of the total students enrolled in each of the programmes or 1 student whichever is higher. The 10% will be rounded off to the nearest next number. Here is the criteria:
Order of Merit
Amount of Scholarship
1st
20% of the tuition fees
2nd
15% of the tuition fees
The rest of the eligible students
10% of the tuition fees
UPES also provides fellowships for MTech and MDes programs, and financial support under their ‘We Care’ initiative in case a student loses any of the earning parents.
To check complete details on all UPES Dehradun Scholarships: Download the PDF

reviews_list.review_title: Excellent college inside Coimbatore for students who love a green campus with a lot of opportunities

review_content.Placements: I chose the Engineering 4-year Information Technology course in Kumaraguru College of Technology, Coimbatore. I am currently in the second year, and I will be completing the course by 2028. The placements, as informed by the seniors and staff, were awesome. Almost 80% of students get placed in companies with an average package of ₹4 to 5 LPA, and almost 160 students joined Information Technology in the year 2024. The top recruiting companies for my college as of 2024 are Amazon, Wipro, Accenture, TCS, SAP, Cognizant, etc. Software Developer, Full Stack Developer, Cybersecurity Analyst, Data Analyst, and Cloud Engineer.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechatronics Engineering - Batch of 2027

review_content.Placements: About 70% of students got placed every year. Eligible students mostly get placed. But if you have arrears and did not opt for the campus placements, you will not get a chance to be placed in the campus interview. Top companies that recruit our students are Solitone Technologies, Delta Electronics, and more. As my college is located in Coimbatore, many companies from Coimbatore may come for the placements. There are many possibilities to get an internship. Our college faculty members provide more opportunities by giving information about the available internship offers, but it is your responsibility to grab them.

For its flagship programme BTech, the admission is based on merit followed by TNEA Counselling. Kumaraguru College of Technology offers 14 UG and 14 PG courses in Engineering, Management and Computer Application streams. The courses are offered in affiliation to Anna University. Interested candidates can apply online for KCT Coimbatore admissions.

eligibility_selection.title: KCT Coimbatore Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: To get admission in Kumaraguru College of Technology, candidates need to fulfil both eligibility and selection requirements. The basic eligibility for Class 12 is UG courses whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. The college offers seats to candidates based on their scores for PG courses. The selection for the flagship programme of KCT i.e. BTech is based on Class 12 score of the candidates followed by TNEA Counselling. Below are KCT Coimbatore courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:

Candidates who are allotted seat in the college based on their TANCET score have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat.
faqs.question: Is TANCET required at Kumaraguru College of Technology?

faqs.answer: Kumaraguru College of Technology accepts GATE scores for admission to M.Tech programme. However, it is not compulsory. Aspirants can also get admission through CEETA PG scores. Besides, candidates must also have passed BE/ BTech with at least 50% aggregate to get admission in the M.Tech programme.

admission_process.title: KCT Coimbatore Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: KCT Coimbatore admission process starts with registration for a course. Candidates must select a course and apply online for admission. The college evaluates the applications of the candidates for merit. Check below the steps to get a seat in KCT Coimbatore:
1: KCT Coimbatore Application Process 2025

Candidates have to apply online for the course of their choice. Candidates have to apply for TNEA Counselling for BTech. For all other courses, aspirants must apply for the accepted exam. Aspirants need to pay an application fee to register for a course.
2: Selection Criteria
Once the application process is over, KCT shortlists candidates for admission. Below is course-wise selection criteria:
KCT Coimbatore BTech Admission:The selection for BE/ BTech programmes is based on Class 12 scores and TNEA rank.
KCT Coimbatore PG Admission:The selection for MTech is based on GATE or CEETA PG scores of candidates. For MBA and MCA, candidates are shortlisted based on their TANCET scores.
3: Counselling & Admission Confirmation

Appear for TANCET Counselling to get a seat in KCT. During the exam counselling process, select KCT to get a seat in the college. Further, pay theKCT Coimbatore feeto confirm their seat in the college.

faqs.question: Does Kumaraguru College of Technology accept TNEA score?
faqs.answer: Kumaraguru College of Technology offers admission to BTech based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Applicants also need to participate in TNEA Counselling and select KCT as the preferred college for admission. TNEA counselling is conducted online in 4 rounds as per the Schedule. Candidates need to participate in corresponding rounds based on their rank.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in Kumaraguru College of Technology for BTech with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria to apply for BTech at Kumaraguru College of Technology. Aspirants need to complete Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate to apply for BTech programme. Hence, candidates with 60% aggregate in Class 12 can get admission to BTech programme.

faqs.question: What is the cut off marks for KCT Coimbatore?
faqs.answer: KCT Coimbatore considers the entrance exam score for admission to PG courses. Aspirants are required to score equal or aboveKCT cutofffor admission. faqs.question: Can I join Kumaraguru College of Technology directly?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates can join  Kumaraguru College of Technology directly under the Management Quota. They have to meet requirement specific to their course for admission to Kumaraguru College of Technology. Admission to BE/ BTech course is based on merit in the last qualifying exam and TNEA Counselling. For all other courses, the selection is entrance-based. Candidates need to pass GATE or CEETA PG for M.Tech and TANCET for MBA and MCA.

faqs.question: How do I get a seat at Kumaraguru College of Technology?
faqs.answer: Kumaraguru College of Technology offers a large diversity of courses to students in various fields. Kumaraguru College of Technology admissions are held on the basis of both merit and entrance tests. Students seeking course admissions must clear their previous qualifying examination and appear for any of the prescribed entrance exams such as CEETA PG, TANCET, GATE, among others. Students can visit the official website to learn more regarding the course-wise eligibility and specialisation details.

hostel.description: The gents’ hostel comprises of four blocks with a capacity to accommodate 1335 students. The Ladies hostel has a capacity to accommodate 987 students. All men and women residents of the hostel are provided rooms on a triple sharing basis. All common areas like dining, washrooms, lobby, terrace, etc. are provided separately for men and women’s hostels.

library.description: The library is extensive owning 67598 titles and 107534 volumes and has a subscription to 186 print journals, 8829 online international journals and 59 magazines for scholarly communication. reviews.review_heading: The best college I had seen.
reviews.review_text: My classroom has fast Wi-Fi and neat halls with an AC hostel, which has rooms with attached bathrooms and also has common bathrooms. Every night our hostel has a doctor meeting with the medicine. Mess with 100 fans, sports are studied without feeling super college.

reviews.review_heading: Great college with placements, facilities, support, and faculty. KCT made my journey memorable.
reviews.review_text: As you can also see, this college has the best infrastructure and hostel throughout India. You guys can also google it, and no wonder you will be shocked. Talking about the area, this college has a massive area of about 150 acres with massive grounds and laboratories overall in the college. This college also has a gym for the students and separate hostel facilities for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent college inside Coimbatore for students who love a green campus with a lot of opportunities
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is the best, with all the requirements and facilities starting from the laboratories for all the departments like Physics, Chemistry, Computer Science, Data Structure, Embedded Systems, Cloud Computing, Mechanical Labs, and many more. The college also has enough auditoriums and halls, and even two theatres for mass crowd functions and other events. The hostel facilities are good, with enough water and daily cleaning, with three meals and one snack per day. The c...

reviews.review_heading: Kumaraguru is a good college for an overall experience. Enjoy college life with good opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a vast green environment. There are Wi-fi facilities everywhere. Every classroom has projectors for PPT presentations. Our labs are good, but I would not say the best, i.e., mechatronics engineering. There is a central library with Wi-fi facility and library computers that students can use. There is a medical clinic present on the college campus and a free ambulance facility for transportation. My hostel life is good with well-maintained hostel buildings, Wi-fi facilities, r...

reviews.review_heading: Don't you want to experience vibrant campus with excellent academics if you want, join Kumaraguru.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is awesome. This college gets an A+ in NAAC accreditation. Our campus has neat and clean infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available. Hostel is safe and secure, and only veg food is provided. Our campus is pet-friendly. Library is big and books are also available. Classrooms are perfect.

reviews.review_heading: Kumaraguru College of Technology is absolutely the best Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Kumaraguru College of Technology has more than 20 courses. It had more spacious classrooms, more laboratories, and free Wi-Fi network facilities available in the college. This college had the biggest auditorium. The library was also there in the college. The college hostel and canteen food quality were very hygienic and healthy. Multiple sports ground facilities were also available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: I like the college. It is a very nice college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very good and pleasant. The rooms in a hostel are very and the wardens are very friendly. Good campus life. The facilities are very good. We have well well-organized library. The hostel is very clean and peaceful. Hostel foods are hygienic and tasty.

reviews.review_heading: Great academics and vibrant campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities for the ECE department are modern labs like VLSI, IoT, embedded systems, well-equipped classrooms,  24x7 Wi-Fi, and a vast library with updated resources. Hostel have comfortable rooms, good hygiene, and a study-friendly ambiance. Mess and canteen serves decent food quality with varieties. The canteen offers snacks and beverages. There is an on-campus clinic with basic medical services. There are excellent facilities for indoor and outdoor games, a gym, and regular sports events.

reviews.review_heading: KCT - Insight by middle bencher.
reviews.review_text: It has well-equipped infrastructure with library and labs. It is a Wi-Fi enabled campus covering all areas. Hostel food is good compared to other colleges. Other than hostel and mess, the campus has cafes like Kore, Namma Cafe, East Kore, and KS Cafe. Medical facilities are available 24X7.

reviews.review_heading: Good choice. Nice faculty members.
reviews.review_text:
Awesome Ambiance: The hostel block is surrounded by a lot of trees, and it gives a good feeling of being around nature. So, any nature lovers, you are sure to be pleased.
Food: It is usual to say bad things about hostel food, but KCT hostels provide quality food with good taste.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of faculty members and good placement, good infrastructure, facilities, etc.
reviews.review_text: All labs are well-equipped with good working machines. Classrooms are fitted with smart boards and are well-spaced. Many places have Wi-Fi facilities including hostel. Food and snacks at hostel are good and medical facilities are available 24/7. Regarding sports and games, we have good tutors and teamwork and achieved many prizes.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied, very low fee collected compared to other colleges.
reviews.review_text: As I am a day scholar, I don't know much about hostels. But my friends said that food is very good and they don’t provide non-veg in our campus except eggs. There is a separate lab for every subject. Food in the canteen is good and the price is also normal.

reviews.review_heading: It is a wonderful college with a good crowd, infrastructure, and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are top-notch. The quality of the food is very good. The library is a very nice place to be. Labs of the mechatronics engineering department have all facilities that are needed to study the course knowing every corner of it.

reviews.review_heading: A look into Kumaraguru Campus.
reviews.review_text: The course was well framed and designed to meet industry expectations. The class rooms are well spacious. Many Wi-Fi spots are available in the college. The infrastructure of the hostels is worth the money. Only vegetarian foods are provided by the college and canteens inside the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Kumaraguru College of Technology is absolutely best engineering college.
reviews.review_text: Kumaraguru College of Technology has good classroom facilities. This college has more hitech mechanical laboratories, well-equipped library also here this college. This college provides free Wi-Fi network facilities on the college campus. Hostel facilities are also here at this college. Hostel and canteen food quality is good. Sports grounds and coaching staff are also available in this college.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are average. Although the course is very valuable, yet many last year students remained without a job. It all depends on the hard work and intelligence of students. More than the college, placements are dependent on the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious, huge and well-ventilated. Food quality in the mess and the canteen is very commendable, and medical facilities are 24x7 available for any emergency case. Sports and games and any outdoor activities are not much encouraged.

reviews_list.batch_info: P.G. Diploma in Nutrition and Dietetics - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with everything except for the fact that there are no placements.

review_content.Placements: Our college did not offer any placements to the students. Only internships were given to the students in different hospitals. I was placed in GMCH - 32 for three months for training under professional dietician. Others were placed in PGI and some were placed in GMSH -16.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has an old building. It is a standard red brick government building. All facilities are available. The college library is pretty impressive. It has two floors and it is very well maintained. There's even a hostel and a well maintained canteen in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Home Science (Foods and Nutrition) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is average college, and personality development subjects can be part of curriculum for students.

review_content.Placements: Enrolment for Placements is not done yet, but a number of students get placed to various companies. The average salary offered varies from 1 LPA - 2 LPA. . After M.Sc., students are sent for 45 days internship in the hospital with a letter of recommendation. Top roles offered in our specialisation is of a dietitian in the hospital, and one can also work in MNC, NGO, Anganwadi and many more. One can also work as a food scientist and home scientist.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good with good labs provided to students. Smart class facility is also available in some classrooms. There is a huge collection of books available for the undergraduate and post-graduate students from every field in the home science. Research papers and editorial sections are available for the M.Sc. . students to carry out their research. Wi-Fi facility is not provided in the college campus and hostel except the computer room. There are two hostels, one for B.Sc. Students and others for M.Sc students who are 83 in number. The hostel has an average infrastructure. But students are provided with food good in taste in the mess. No medical facilities are provided in the hostel. Canteen food is good and affordable. The college has NSS and NCC as well as sports team for competitionS.

review_summary.college_name: Government Home Science College, Chandigarh Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Home Science (Apparel and Textile Design) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Home Science College, Chandigarh.

content.Placements: Our college provides good placements. Every year, multiple placement drives are held, and 10-20 companies visit for campus drives. The minimum salary package offered is up to 3.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is well-maintained and well-built. It has very beautiful and new building and gardens. It has a botanical garden full of plants and the whole campus is greenery. Hostel, library, mess, canteen, botanical garden, and Chaitanya School are some of the main attractions on the campus which make the campus very beautiful. The food is really tasty compared to other hostels and PGs. However, I don't recommend the hostel as buildings are very old and can collapse at any time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Home Science (Dietetics) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college is value for money.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are average. Although the course is very valuable, yet many last year students remained without a job. It all depends on the hard work and intelligence of students. More than the college, placements are dependent on the students.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious, huge and well-ventilated. Food quality in the mess and the canteen is very commendable, and medical facilities are 24x7 available for any emergency case. Sports and games and any outdoor activities are not much encouraged.

individual_reviews.course: P.G. Diploma in Nutrition and Dietetics - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with everything except for the fact that there are no placements.

content.Placements: Our college did not offer any placements to the students. Only internships were given to the students in different hospitals. I was placed in GMCH - 32 for three months for training under professional dietician. Others were placed in PGI and some were placed in GMSH -16.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has an old building. It is a standard red brick government building. All facilities are available. The college library is pretty impressive. It has two floors and it is very well maintained. There's even a hostel and a well maintained canteen in the college.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Home Science (Foods and Nutrition) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is average college, and personality development subjects can be part of curriculum for students.

content.Placements: Enrolment for Placements is not done yet, but a number of students get placed to various companies. The average salary offered varies from 1 LPA - 2 LPA. . After M.Sc., students are sent for 45 days internship in the hospital with a letter of recommendation. Top roles offered in our specialisation is of a dietitian in the hospital, and one can also work in MNC, NGO, Anganwadi and many more. One can also work as a food scientist and home scientist.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good with good labs provided to students. Smart class facility is also available in some classrooms. There is a huge collection of books available for the undergraduate and post-graduate students from every field in the home science. Research papers and editorial sections are available for the M.Sc. . students to carry out their research. Wi-Fi facility is not provided in the college campus and hostel except the computer room. There are two hostels, one for B.Sc. Students and others for M.Sc students who are 83 in number. The hostel has an average infrastructure. But students are provided with food good in taste in the mess. No medical facilities are provided in the hostel. Canteen food is good and affordable. The college has NSS and NCC as well as sports team for competitionS.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Home Science (Dietetics) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with limited knowledge. Good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 1. No placements for graduates. Only for post graduate students. The salary offered would be around 25,000 per month. Max hospital Mohali was the top recruiter, For master students and PG Diploma students. Assistant dietitian, helper in the clinic were the roles offered to them. 10% of master students got an internship.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-fi was available. Smart and spacious classrooms were available. Library having all types of books related to every course were available. All type of facilities were available in hostel, the food and mess requirements were matched for every student. There was no game facility in the campus. But medical facility was available.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does NMIMS School of Design accept for admission to B.Des?

faqs.answer: A:    NMIMS School of Design, Mumbai offers a B.Des programme in Humanising Technology at Undergraduate level. Minimum criteria to apply for the programme is HSC with total 50% in all subjects. The admission is granted on the basis of a valid score and merit in NMIMS-DAT above 80 percentile are required to get selected. The questions and discussions in the studio test and interview revolve around problem-solving, design thinking, technology awareness and interest of the individual. Basic skill like communication and problem solving is evaluated. You can check admission detail on shiksha.com or college offical website.
faqs.question: What is the selection process for B.Des and what is the minimum NMIMS DAT percentile required?

faqs.answer: A:    Here are some details regarding B.Des cutoffs:-For top design colleges like NIFT and NID, cutoffs are extremely high and competition is very tough. NIFT typically requires a minimum of 80-90%ile score in the entrance exam for shortlisting.Other leading design institutes affiliated with universities have cutoffs in the range of 50-60%ile scores in qualifying design aptitude tests.Colleges accept either merit scores in relevant design entrance tests like NID DAT, NIFT MAT, or marks in 12th board exams. Cutoffs in 12th boards are usually set at 50% to 60% for general category applicants.Additionally, many colleges conduct their own entrance tests, interviews, or portfolio reviews to assess applicant's creativity and interest in the field. The final admission offer is given based on a composite assessment across these parameters.So in summary, while the most prestigious design programs are intensely competitive, other relatively newer institutes are more realistic with 50-60% + cutoffs either in entrance exams or 12th boards.
faqs.question: What are the cutoff marks required for B.Des?

faqs.answer: A:    NMIMS School of Design accepts the following entrance exam scores for admission to its undergraduate and postgraduate design programs :- NMIMS Design Aptitude Test (DAT) :-This is NMIMS' own entrance test specifically for design admissionsIt has a written aptitude test, case study analysis and creative ability assessmentDAT scores are mandatory for all NMIMS design programs.NID DAT :-Scores from National Institute of Design's Design Aptitude Test are also acceptedNID DAT also assesses creative and design abilities through multiple choice questions and case studies.CEEDCommon Entrance Examination for Design conducted by IIT BombayTests visual perception, creativity, drawing, etc. CEED qualified candidates can apply for NMIMS design programs.UCEEDUndergraduate Common Entrance Exam for Design accepted for B.Des admissionsConducted by IIT Bombay to assess design-based thinking skillsIn addition, candidates have to provide Class 12th percentage, portfolio, Standardized tests scores (SAT, in specific cases) as applicable for different NMIMS design admissions.In conclusion, NID DAT, CEED, and UCEED scores are required, but NMIMS DAT scores are required in order for candidates to apply to the school of design's design programs.

content.Placements: The School of Design provides great placement opportunities and guarantees 100% placement for every batch. individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Humanising Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A Complete Design Learning Experience.

content.Placements: Almost 100% of us have secured internships from our college, with many of us receiving PPOs from companies. The common roles offered to us are those of UI/UX Designers and Product Designers. The curriculum includes an accredited industry internship module in the final year, providing valuable industry exposure and hands-on experience as part of the course.
content.Infrastructure: The college is located on the 6th floor of the UPG College. The facilities include all the basic amenities required by designers, including a workshop with a variety of machines, including 3D printers, a laser cutter, and a variety of tools. We also have a dedicated user testing lab to test our design. We have access to the NMIMS Library and all the canteens located in the NMIMS and Mithibai campus.

admission_process.title: NMIMS School of Design Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: NMIMS School of Design admission 2025is entrance-based. The college offers a four-year, full-time BDes in Humanising Technology course. Admission to NMIMS School of Design is done based on the performance of the candidate inthe NMIMS DAT. Candidates who have passed their class 12 in any stream with a minimum 50% aggregate are eligible to apply for admission to theNMIMS School of Design

NMIMS School of Design is a school under SVKM’s NMIMS, Mumbai, that offers a definitive path to students with an artistic bent of mind with its four-year BDes in Humanising Technology programme. Candidates seeking admission can apply online on the official website of the School.

NMIMS School of Design offers the BDes course in the offline mode to shortlisted candidates. The admission process is entrance-based, and candidates must appear for the entrance test and the following personal interview in order to participate in the admission process. Learn more about NMIMS Schoool of Design and the course on offer through the highlights table given below:
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.

NMIMS School of Design offers a four-year full-time BDes in Humanising Technology course at the undergraduate level. Admission to the NMIMS School of Design BDes course is entrance-based. Given below is theNMIMS School of Design course eligibility and selection criteria:

The candidate must have passed Class 12 or equivalent examination in any stream and should have obtained a minimum of 50% aggregate marks from a recognized Board. International Baccalaureate Diploma (I.B. certificate / & D.P. awarded candidates) are eligible only if they have cleared their I.B. exam with a total of 24 credits (compulsory) and passed 3 H.L. & 3 S.L. mandatorily.

NMIMS School of Design admissionto the flagship BDes course is done throughNMIMS DAT. The complete NMIMS School of Design admission process is inclusive of three steps, and they areregistration, shortlisting of candidates, and acceptance of the admission offer by the applicant. Candidates are advised to check the course-specific eligibility criteria before starting their admission process.
Check out the step-wiseNMIMS School of Design admission processbelow:
Step 1: NMIMS School of Design Application Process 2025

Candidates who meet the course-specific eligibility criteria are required to fill out theNMIMS School of Design application formthrough the official website of the college. Applicants must cross-check all the details before paying the application fee.
Step 2: Selection Process
Admission to the NMIMS School of Design BDes is done based on the performance of the candidate in NMIMS DAT. The NMIMS DAT includes the following stages:

Note:Candidates who have a validUCEED scorecardby the end of the registration process will beexempted from appearing for the Studio testconducted by NMIMS. However, such candidates will have to submit their portfolios and appear for Personal interviews on important dates.
Step 3: Final Admission

After the selection rounds are completed, NMIMS School of Design willrelease a merit list on its official website. Selected candidates are required topay the admission confirmation feeand appear for thedocument verification process.

hostel_campus.college_name: NMIMS School of Design Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Hostel facility includes two full-fledged hostels and three rented residential accommodations (taken care of by the University itself) in Mumbai, separately for boys and girls. Students are provided with all necessary facilities in the hostel along with some value-added services. Students are treated to good quality, affordable food in the hostel.
facilities: BDes: A four year course with a specialisation in Humanising Technology.
BSc: NMIMS School of Design offers a three year BSc course with a specialisation in Animation and V

library.description: R. M. Desai Library houses an area of approximately 7000 square feet with a seating capacity of 130 people. It is fully computerised and uses Koha software. The library has a myriad collection of books and periodicals ranging from classics to the latest, covering Design, Technology, Science and Management.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Volleyball Court, Table Tennis

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Volleyball Court, Table Tennis

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Usability Lab, XR (Mixed Reality)Lab

reviews.review_heading: It is good for students who want to explore design and technology.
reviews.review_text: NMIMS School of Design offers great infrastructure with well-equipped classrooms featuring the latest technology to support student learning. Each classroom has Wi-Fi. The campus includes labs and machines like 3D printers and CNC machines for rapid prototyping and user testing.

reviews.review_heading: A Complete Design Learning Experience.
reviews.review_text: The college is located on the 6th floor of the UPG College. The facilities include all the basic amenities required by designers, including a workshop with a variety of machines, including 3D printers, a laser cutter, and a variety of tools. We also have a dedicated user testing lab to test our design. We have access to the NMIMS Library and all the canteens located in the NMIMS and Mithibai campus.

reviews.review_heading: Great opportunity for students wanting to pursue a career in Digital Product Design.
reviews.review_text: NMIMS School of Design boasts of excellent infrastructure, well-equipped classrooms with the latest technological advance to help students explore all modern arena. All classrooms are equipped with Wi-Fi's. Multiple labs available to help students with prototype testing, user testing etc. Hostel facilities also provided.

reviews.review_heading: SOD - Potential for Improvement.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are pretty decent; they're kept clean and tidy when we aren't working. While there are many facilities, there are usually extensive procedures when gaining access to them, and lots of people's permission is required. If the faculty isn't present and doesn't regularly check the mail, there may be delays in projects. This is mainly for our Builder's Sanctum, 3D printers, UT Labs, and any tools.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college offers complimentary Wi-Fi access to all students, and classrooms are equipped with smartboards to enhance our learning experience. Additionally, there is a library where we can borrow books. The hostel where I reside provides excellent accommodation with amenities such as three meals a day, free Wi-Fi, and laundry services. Moreover, the menu at the hostel changes on a weekly basis.

reviews.review_heading: Love the curriculum and practical experience NMIMS School of Design offers!
reviews.review_text: The NMIMS SOD campus is on the 6th floor of the Mithibai Building and has proper Wi-Fi, clean washrooms, and labs, along with 3D printing facilities. The classrooms are adequately equipped with locker facilities and smartboards. Design schools are generally hectic, and until 7-8 p.m., we are in college, making the campus our second home. I haven't used hostel services so far.

reviews.review_heading: NMIMS SOD - Opportunity awaits.
reviews.review_text: NMIMS SOD has Wi-Fi that works throughout the premises (although certain websites like Pinterest and Instagram are blocked). There are labs for workshop activities like woodworking with power tools and state-of-the-art machinery. There is a tinkering lab for the use of 3D printing and laser engraving machines. Our library has an OPAC system that lets us view the items that are available to us and those books that we can request from other NMIMS universities, free of charge. The classrooms are ai...

reviews.review_heading: A great learning experience.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides various resources like a library, 3D printers, laser cutters, etc. A well-stocked workshop with different tools is provided, which is very useful for working on new projects and assignments. There is also a variety of food options available throughout our campus. Within a 2km radius, there are many good hostels and guest houses available for outstation students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a distinctive curriculum that brings out or maximum potential .
reviews.review_text: Our college provides many facilities, ranging from multiple 3D printing machines to laser cutting, etc. We have a dedicated workshop equipped with each and every type of tool required for hands-on experience for model making and physical prototype building. Along with this, we have a stability testing lab for research and interview purposes. We have four studios with lockers for every student. We have an interactive space where speaker sessions and events are held.

reviews.review_heading: Great course structure, really good facilities and activities, excellent exposure.
reviews.review_text: Strong Wi-Fi, availability of Builders Sanctum for workshops, wood construction, etc., and User Testing lab and Interactive sessions and events. Classrooms are cleaned every day by staff and air-conditioned with locker amenities and smart boards. The library has a vast collection of books. The mess also has a wide variety of food items, with 3 canteens within the campus. Various clubs are also available, including cultural, sports, photography, graphic, environment, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in all aspects, and I am satisfied with facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides many facilities like a 3D printing machine, laser cutter, etc. Our college has a workshop for students to work and learn new things and use it for their assignment purposes, which includes machines such as table saws, band saws, etc. They provide four studios and lockers for every student. Our college has an interactive space where many speaker sessions are held, which is good for students to build up their careers.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides a unique curriculum and learning experience.
reviews.review_text: Our college has four studio classrooms for different batches and a library. A workshop and tinkering labs are available, which allow students to explore experiments and have a creative space to design and develop. The studio classrooms are spacious and well-designed for collaborative work. Labs are well-equipped with a variety of tools and machinery that aid in prototyping. Students also have Wi-Fi access throughout the day in college. There are multiple canteen options available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of NMIMS School of Design, NMIMS.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure includes different classrooms for different batches and a builder's sanctum and tinkering labs, allowing students to experiment and explore design in a creative atmosphere. Labs are well-equipped with laser cutting machines,  3D printers, and various cutting tools and machinery for prototyping and experimenting with different materials.

reviews.review_heading: They bring out the best in you!
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure includes 4 studio classrooms for the various batches along with a builders sanctum and tinkering labs which helps a student explore and have a creative space to design. The labs are equipped with hand and powered tools and machines which helps in prototyping and experimenting with varied materials as needed. The entire culture of work created through the infrastructure makes the students feel welcomed and gives them the freedom to move around and work in groups. The students a...

reviews.review_heading: Our curriculum defines the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has laboratories for rapid prototyping with hand and powered tools, and electronics, where students work with Arduino boards and various kinds of sensors. The classrooms are spacious and have been designed for group and collaborative work. We have good internet connectivity which allows us to research, download and work on our assignments efficiently.

review_content.Placements: Placements are average. The highest salary package offered was 4 LPA. The lowest salary package offered ranges between 1 LPA - 2 LPA. Internships help students to gather practical knowledge that complements their academic studies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. New engineering branches are introduced in this college.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very good. They are supportive and experienced. Teachers always clarify our doubts. All teachers are well-qualified from top institutions. Semester exams are conducted by the BTEUP board.

reviews_list.review_title: All faculty members are so good.

paragraphs: Government Girls Polytechnic College, Lucknow admissions are based on merit. reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is very good. There are many labs, computer labs with Wi-Fi systems. Library is available here. Our college hostel mess is available. And their food quality is good. In our mess, the menu and food are decided like what to cook on which day. Sports are organized here every year.

reviews.review_heading: The facilities were good at the college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities were of good quality at this college. The college has a decent infrastructure for this diploma course. The college has Wi-Fi, computer labs, a hostel, a canteen, a library, etc. on the campus. The college hostel was located near the hostel. Sports facilities were available at the college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for girls.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. New engineering branches are introduced in this college.

reviews.review_heading: All faculty members are so good.
reviews.review_text: Government Polytechnic is not just about academics; college infrastructure is good. The library is available at my college. It's a vibrant hub of cultural and sporting activities. The college hosts numerous cultural and sports events, fostering a well-rounded development for its students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college has classrooms, labs, a library, and Wi-Fi. The hostel accommodations are comfortable. The food served in the mess is good. The campus features a well-organised canteen, efficient medical provisions, and a range of sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in Purvanchal for girls.
reviews.review_text: Our college building is new. Laboratories are well-equipped. Hostel facilities are decent. Canteen is very good. Our campus has good environment. Mess is great.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. It has Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, etc. Our college has good environment. The playground is available to play games. The mess and canteen facilities are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for electronics engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is too good. Wi-Fi facility is available in all the campus. Labs are available for every practical subject. Canteen facilities are available in the college campus. Hostel available is there in the college campus. Medical facility is too good. A library is available as well.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers comprehensive amenities. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. The hostel facility is currently available as it has been under repair since 2021. Our labs and classrooms are in excellent condition. They are well-maintained. The library has a collection of approximately 9000 books. We actively engage in sports and games every month. Our college provides conducive environment for learning.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is excellent in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: In our department there is Wi-Fi and laboratories are very good, classrooms are very big and clean, there is a library also in which all the books related to the course are available. The rooms of the hostel are very clean and good, the quality of food is very good and all the snacks, etc., are available in the canteen. There is also a medical room, sports ground, seminar hall, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Girls Polytechnic College, Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of our college are very good, and the infrastructure is also good. Labs and classrooms are a bit not good, but everything is even alright. Mess and canteen are also good, and food delivered is also good. Medical facilities are also available. For sports, an annual function is conducted in our college, and students also win medals.

reviews.review_heading: All instruments are present but not used, you have to nag your faculty everytime.
reviews.review_text: Classes are being renovated this year. Wi-Fi facility is available only in the computer lab. There is no digital library. The food in the mess is okay neither bad nor too good. There are two canteens but no medical facilities. There is no dedicated sports period, but there is a badminton court and an annual sports day.

admission_overview.college_name: Dr CV Raman University Bilaspur Admission 2025: Dates, Fee, Application & Selection

admission_overview.title: CVRU Bilaspur Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: CVRU admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The university accepts entrance exams such as JEE Main, CGPET, CAT, MAT, etc. for admission to specific courses. CVRU Bilaspur also accepts AJEE conducted by AISECT Group of Institutions for admission to various courses. The university offers more than 50 courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels. The programmes are offered in multiple streams such as Engineering, Management, Science, etc. Besides, the university also offers distance education courses via IODE.

eligibility_selection.title: CVRU Bilaspur Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: CVRU admission to the UG and PG courses is based on merit and scores in the course-specific entrance exam. The university offers regular as well as courses in distance education mode. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Below are CVRU courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria: Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate

admission_process.title: CVRU Bilaspur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: CVRU admission processincludes steps such as registration, selection, counselling and fee payment. Currently, the admissions are open, and candidates can apply for the preferred course. Below are the steps to get a seat in CVRU Bilaspur:
1- CVRU Bilaspur Application Process 2025

Students meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online on official website of university. Students are first required to create a new account followed by filling out the application form. They also need to pay an application fee for admission.
2- Selection

CVRU selects candidates for most of the courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The university accepts JEE Main, CG PET, CAT, MAT, XAT, etc. for admission to specific courses. Besides, CVRU also accepts AJEE or AISECT Joint Entrance Exam for admission to BE, MBA, LLB, LLM, etc.
3- Counselling and Admission Confirmation

Once the entrance exam results are out, aspirants are offered seat in the university. Aspirants need to come for counselling and document verification. Selected candidates further need to pay aCVRU feeto confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.answer: The Fee structure for an MBA at Dr. C.V. Raman University Dr. C.V. Raman University offers M.Tech., MBA, and PGDBM as part of its postgraduate program. The minimum eligibility required for the courses is a graduation in a relevant field. CVRU CET is applicable to all the courses. faqs.question: How is CV Raman University? What package can BSc students expect after completing the degree?
faqs.answer: Accredited by NAAC, CV Raman University is the first private university of Chhattisgarh. With a focus on deep research in the Science department, the university offers a three-year BSc programme. The programme is spread across various specialisations including Biology, Biotechnology, Mathematics, and more. The starting salary may vary from student to student depending on the choice of specialisations. Tabulated below are prospect job profiles and respective average salaries after completing a general BSc course: Job Profiles Average Annual Salary Accountant INR 3.3 LPA Numerical Analyst INR 6 LPA Biotech engineer INR 5.5 LPA Researcher INR 3.4 LPA Economist INR 11.7 LPA Statistician INR 6 LPA Note: The above-mentioned salaries are based on industry averages. However, not every student needs to start within the same range of salary. It depends on various factors such as knowledge level, skills, market demand, etc.

hostel.description: The hostel of the University has more than 150 students. It has all the facilities with the main office, security room, and a guest house. It has all the basic amenities so that the students can get a comfortable place after a tiring day.

library.description: The University has a spacious library, stacked with more than 40,000 books, 5,000 titles, thousands of CDs, journals and reports that cover all subjects pertinent to the courses. Besides a huge collection of books on Engineering, Science, and Humanities, the library has a total seating capacity of 600 with an Integrated Information System in place.

reviews.review_heading: This college has value for money, but hostel food is not good.
reviews.review_text: I have been staying in the campus hostel for 2 years, and this is my 3rd year. Food is worse than anything I have eaten in my lifetime. The food in the hostel mess is very bad and tasteless. Everything is okay, but the food provided is very bad. We don’t have Wi-Fi, as the university doesn’t provide it in the classes or the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: College with good faculty and infrastructure for our course.
reviews.review_text: Our college has an average infrastructure for this course. The campus has a Physics labs and a library with all the necessary materials. Wi-Fi, canteen, hostel, parking, sports etc. facilities were also available in the college. Food in the mess and the canteen was good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: Everything was good except the placements.
reviews.review_text: In terms of facilities and infrastructure, this was a very good college. All the facilities like the library, labs, classrooms, and other amenities were of top quality. There was no hostel facility given to the students. In the canteen of the college, various food items were served which were of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: providing quality education and promoting research and innovation in diverse fields.
reviews.review_text: It typically provides facilities such as libraries, laboratories, hostels, and sports facilities to support students' academic and extracurricular activities. Free Wi-Fi is available in college, and canteen quality food is available. Sports like kabaddi are played in Khelo India, joined in summer 2023.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. C.V. Raman University.
reviews.review_text: Everything provided in our college was up to mark.

reviews.review_heading: My college life in cv raman university.
reviews.review_text: C. v raman has one of the most beautiful infrastructure in Chhattisgarh. Each course or departments has its separate buildings. Hostel facility of cv raman is very good and affordable. There are 100 rooms in a hostel and there are 3 hostlers in each room. Hostel provides you with one table, chair, beds and almirah. Mess facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: The college is best for everyone.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are very nice and relevant like Wi-Fi, Labs, Classrooms, Library, smart classrooms and cafeteria etc. The quality of our hostel is very nice and also affordable. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is above average.

reviews.review_heading: My college life in cv raman university.
reviews.review_text: One of the most beautiful campus in Chhattisgarh is cv ranam. There are many courses in cv ranam university and each course has its separate building. Hostel facility is aslo very good as the provide you with B.Ed table, chair and one almira. There are total 100 rooms in a hostel and there are only 3 students in each room. Medical, sports room, mess etc. All facilities are available in cv ranam.

reviews.review_heading: This college gave me an experience that resulted into a person that made me like myself.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi connection is better than average, the labs have well functioned, the classroom is student-friendly, and the best experience. Mess food quality is average & four times a week non-veg is served. And quantity is pretty sufficient, sports and games are available to all. And can be enrolled accordingly.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty, facilities, and good placement options.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and there is a good canteen. We have good medical facilities and a good opportunity for sports. The library is very well organised and well-equipped with many books, and also the food provide by the canteen needs to be improved but overall those are also good for health.

reviews.review_heading: The college always provides placements but it also depends on your scores.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was very good. It had its library, sports center, and computer labs, and also a technological equipment lab. There were many courses that our college offered. You can take admission in any of them of your choice and enjoy the infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it was not a good experience.
reviews.review_text: Our college had a good infrastructure. All lab equipment was available. Every book was available in the library. It had a good canteen with good hygiene. Hostel facilities were good and rooms were quite big for the accommodation of 2 students. Every department had its well-equipped labs.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, and I suggest students to opt for our college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, washrooms, auditorium, restroom, staff room, principal office, playground, dance room, chemistry lab, physics lab, biology lab, basketball court and many more. The food served here is very good. A canteen, medical facilities, etc., available here are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for BBA course with the low fee structure.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility was good with clean with a hygienic environment. Proper maintenance of college and hostel were done. Medical facilities are quite good. Labs and library were available in the college in different departments. Classrooms were available in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college with good placements.
reviews.review_text:
The campus of CVRU was awesome. The entire campus was Wi-Fi enabled with outstanding high-speed. A well-equipped library was available and had enough books for students. Hostels were new, but they didn't have any air conditioners. Water was available 24x7, and the bathroom conditions were good. Hostel was very good for students. Classrooms and labs were also good. All the essentials were available in the labs.
.

data.description: There are a lot of facilities for infrastructure at Dr CV Raman University. The CVRU Bilaspur campus has Wi-Fi access. college_info.college_name: Dr CV Raman University Bilaspur Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The Fee structure for an MBA at Dr. C.V. Raman University  Dr. C.V. Raman University offers M.Tech., MBA, and PGDBM as part of its postgraduate program. The minimum eligibility required for the courses is a graduation in a relevant field. CVRU CET is applicable to all the courses. For M.Tech, candidates with valid GATE scores will also be considered for admission. In the case of MBA and PGDBM, candidates with valid MAT or CAT will also be considered.
Total Programme fee INR 59800/-
Exams fee per year INR 2000/-

The CVRU Bilaspur offers CG scholarship programmes to help students with financial aid so they can finish their education and achieve their ambitions. The following are the many CG Scholarship programmes that CVRU offers:
Scholarship for underprivileged

Candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC community can apply for this scholarship programme if the annual income is below INR 1 Lacs for OBC or it is below INR 2 Lacs for SC/ST. The candidates will be required to submit a caste certificate and income certificate duly signed by the tahsildar.
Scholarship for Meritorious

Candidates who have secured 85% or above marks in SSC/HSC examination can apply for this scholarship program. The scholarship will be given either in bulk or in parts at the beginning of every term. Special concessions will also be provided to the candidates hailing from economically backward communities.
Scholarship programme for ME/MTech
To promote post-graduation education in India, INR 8000/- will be granted by MHRD to GATE-qualified students to afford higher education and meet the demand for thesis work.
Notice acandidates can avail of only one kind of scholarship programme by producing the necessary documents along with the scholarship form.
Yes, BSc students are offered various scholarships at CV Raman University. These scholarships cater to meritorious and in-need students. Mentioned below are details about these scholarships:
Merit-based: Candidates who have secured 85% or above marks in the SSC/HSC examination can apply for this scholarship programme
Category-based:
- Candidates belonging to the SC/ST community and family income of less than INR 2 lakh.
- Candidates belonging to the OBC community and family income of less than INR 1 lakh.
- The candidates will be required to submit a caste certificate and income certificate duly signed by the tahsildar.

review_content.General: The campus has reliable Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs, and tidy smart classrooms. The central library is spacious with good seating, e-resources, and extended exam-time hours. Sports facilities include a ground, gym, and indoor games. A medical room and ambulance tie-ups are available. Hostel rooms are clean with adequate storage, water is available most of the time. The mess food is hygienic and average in taste, while the canteen has a better variety. Overall maintenance and security are good, and complaints are usually resolved within a day or two.

paragraphs: PSGR Krishnammal College For Women admission 2025 is open. The college offers various UG, PG, and research courses in two categoriesAided and Self-financingsuch as BA, BSc, BCom, MA, MSc, and others. For final selection, the basic eligibility is to pass the last qualifying exam. Candidates are offered direct admission based on the same. Read below to know more information related to PSGR Krishnammal College For Women admission along with course eligibility, and selection criteria is available in the following segments:
PSGR Krishnammal College For Women Admission 2025: Eligibility and Selection Criteria

PSGR Krishnammal College For Women admission to all the courses ismerit-based. To be eligible for admission, candidates must fill out the eligibility and selection criteria for their desired courses. The basic eligibility criteria forUGis to passClass 10 and Class 12from a recognised board, and forPG and PhDcourses, pass agraduation degreeand master's degree, respectively. Candidates searching for admission to PSGR Krishnammal College For Women in any UG, PG, or PhD courses are required to apply on the official website of the college for admission.
Step 2: PSGR Krishnammal College For Women Selection Rounds

Candidates are required to pass Class 10 and Class 12 for admission to UG courses and pass graduation and master's degrees for admission to PG and PhD courses, respectively. It is required to fulfil the eligibility criteria before applying for admission.
Step 3: Final Seat Allotment/Fee Submission

The college releases the merit list based on the last qualifying exam scores of candidates. After candidates get shortlisted in the selection round, they are required to pay PSGR Krishnammal College For Women fee to get seats.

In 2025, PSGR Krishnammal College For Women fell 2 ranks to #9 rank in the 'Colleges' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

reviews.review_heading: Krishnammal life is heaven.

college_info.college_name: JSS Science and Technology University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Rankings

highlights.summary:
The COMEDK UGET 2026 registration last date for JSS Science and Technology University admission to the BE/BTech programme has been extended till Mar 20, 2026. Also, the COMEDK UGET exam 2026 will be held on May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
JSS Science and Technology University is popular for its Engineering and Science courses such as BTech and MBA. BTech students are placed in top companies. Also, the course is approved by the AICTE and the Government of Karnataka. BTech specialisations include Civil Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Biotechnology, Environmental Engineering, etc.
JSS Science and Technology University Mysore MBA is offered for a duration of two years in full-time mode. MBA students can become Management Consultant, Investment Bankers, or can enter fields such as Marketing, Healthcare, Human Resources, and others. JSS Science and Technology University MBA is taught by well-qualified and experienced faculty members.

placements.overview: JSS Science and Technology University, Mysuru has a placement and training cell. JSS STU is known for its placement record with prominent companies from diverse fields. The highest and median salary package offered at JSS STU placements 2024 stood at 60 LPA and 9 LPA. There were more than 400 recruiters during the placement drive. Apart from this, the University organises workshops and training programs to train students for job interviews. Top recruiters include Cisco, Accenture, IBM, Apple, Microsoft and Google.

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Many students started their own start-ups
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.question: What was highest package offered at JSS Science and Technology University?

faqs.answer: A:    As per the latest report 2022, a total of 435 recruiters participated during JSS Science and Technology University placements 2022. The top recruiters of JSS Science and Technology University in 2023 included Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Deloitte, LG, etc. These recruiters placed students of BTech, MTech, and MBA in various domains with handsome packages.
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of JSS Science and Technology University placements?

faqs.answer: A:    JSS Science and Technology University has a strong record of placements for BTech, M.Tech and MBA courses. In 2022, the participating recruiters offered 1,200 jobs to the students of various courses of the university viz., MBA, MCA and BTech, etc. The highest package offered was INR 40 LPA. faqs.question: Does JSS Science and Technology University have good placements?

faqs.answer: A:    JSS Science and technology universityhas concluded its placement drive for the batch passing out in 2022. As per the latest report,  the highest and average package offered during 2022 placements was INR 40 LPA and INR 16 LPA, respectively. In total,  435 companies participated in the placement process and presented 1,200 job offers to the students. reviews_list.review_title: Good to go. Need to concentrate more on placements than the attendance and just the book knowledge.

review_content.Placements: I am a student of batch 2024-2025. In my batch, the placement numbers are decent. Out of 120 students, around 35 students got placed, where the average package is 5-6 LPA and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, and others.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is above average. Each class had projectors and all labs had fast internet connection. Coming to the hostel, I'll rate it 3.5. The food is sometimes good and sometimes bad. Gymnasium is good. Importance is given to sports and physical education.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best colleges in Mysore, if you are willing to do MCA.

review_content.Placements: According to my knowledge, in our MCA batch, around 80-85% of students were placed through campus placements. The highest package offered was around 12.4 LPA, while the lowest was 3.5 LPA, and the average package stayed around 5-6 LPA. Top recruiting companies included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, LTIMindtree, Accenture, Capgemini, Cognizant, and Bosch. Nearly 60% of the students also got internships in companies like TCS, Infosys, startups, and analytics-based organizations, mostly in roles like software development, web development, and testing.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Business System - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: JSS Science and Technology Mysuru review and 2026 placement.

review_content.Placements: The placements of this college are decent. The average package you can expect in this college is around 10 to 11 LPA, and the median is around 9 to 9.5 LPA. The overall placement percentage is around 80 percent, including all branches. Around 90 percent of students in CSE-related branches are placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is good. Since this is an old established college, the infrastructure is outdated compared to other colleges through CET or COMEDK. It is an old-styled college. But the hostel facilities are very good, as the hostels are newly built.

review_summary.college_name: JSS Science and Technology University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STU.

content.Placements: Good companies do come for placements, and it is the single best pro of this college. This year, the average package offered is around 11 LPA, with CSE leading in terms of employment and the highest package. The number of companies coming for internships is good. An ample chance is given for students to get internships.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is dirty and neglected. Cleanliness does not exist for the warden. Our college lab facilities are decent and well-equipped. Notably, the golden jubilee block is the best out of all. Sports facilities are good since the college is huge. An in-house gym is available too, which is free for the college students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Great placement, average infrastructure, and a peaceful campus.

content.Placements: The placement rates of our college are pretty great, 80 to 90 percent of students got placed last year. This year the highest package offered is 40LPA. Among IT related Branch CSE, AIML, ISE, CSBS, the average package offered is around 13 to 14 LPA, and the median package is above 12LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities provided by our college are below average. The main CSE building, Golden Jubilee Bhavan, and the admin block are great, but the rest of the buildings are pretty average. For freshers, they conduct classes in the Polymer Science building, whose classrooms are pretty bad. They really need to improve it.

admission_process.title: JSS Science and Technology University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: JSS Science and Technology University Admission 2025 is open for the UG and PG courses, BTech, MTech, MSc, and MBA. Admission to the engineering courses is done through CET, COMED-K, JEE. The Unversity accepts Karnatak PGCET for admission to its PG programmes. The admission process is completely online. JSS Science and Technology University offers more than 50 courses across multiplem specialisations. Find below the highlights of the Uiversity:
Particulars
JSS Science and Technology University Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG & PG
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.

SS Science and Technology University Admission 2025 for all of its courses is either done through entrance exams or course specific qualifying. Find below the admission process of SS Science and Technology University:
Step 1: SS Science and Technology University Application process
Candidates are required to visit the University's admission portal to fill the application form. Before that candidates have to register themselves to create a profile.
Step 2: Eligibility Check

Once the application form is submitted, it will be scanned for course specific eligibility. Basically candidate's application form will be checked for proff that he/she have the qualification for admission to their desired course.
Step 3: Provisional allotment
After the eligibility check candidates will be provided with allotment list, where the name of candidates who have secured seat for admission at the University will be listed.
Step 4: Fee payment
Now the candidates have to pay the fees for finalising their admission at the University.
For more information about JSS Science and Technology University check out the below video:

faqs.question: What is the cutoff trend for the KCET exam for BE courses at JSS Science and Technology University in 2025?
faqs.answer: When compared with the closing ranks of the previous years, the cutoff ranks of KCET seem to be lower than previous year. However, the data on cutoff ranks for BE courses at JSS Science and Technology University is incomplete which makes it difficult to give a proper analysis of cutoff trends for BE courses at JSS Science and Technology University.

faqs.question: Can I attempt COMEDK exam if I fail to score an appropriate rank for BE admissions at JSS Science and Technology University in KCET?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates who fail to secure an appropriate rank in KCET can attempt COMEDK exam for a better result. The dates for the results of KCET is very close to the date of exam for COMEDK. If the candidates feel like they would not be able to score the appropriate rank in KCET, they should apply for COMEDK as soon as possible. The official website for these exams will contain the timeline candidates need to follow.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admissions into BE courses at JSS Science and Technology University?
faqs.answer: No, to be eligible for admissions into BE courses at JSS Science and Technology University, candidates need to clear either the KCET exam or the COMEDK exam. Candidates do not need to clear both exams to be eligible for BE admissions at JSS Science and Technology University. The admissions at JSS Science and Technology University is based on the cutoff list of the above mentioned exams.

description: JSS Science and Technology University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

JSS Science and Technology University Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 2608 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 3769 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was more competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at JSS Science and Technology University. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 2608 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 2393, while in 2023, it was 6254.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

JSS Science and Technology University accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering has the lowest cutoff rank of 6390 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:

According to the JSS Science and Technology University B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering stood at 15742 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

For the HS quota, the cutoff rank for the same specialisation was 21598. Comparing both the quotas, the last round cutoff rank for General AI category students was more competitive for admission than the HS quota students.
