reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STUReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STU.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is dirty and neglected. Cleanliness does not exist for the warden. Our college lab facilities are decent and well-equipped. Notably, the golden jubilee block is the best out of all. Sports facilities are good since the college is huge. An in-house gym is available too, which is free for the college students.

reviews.review_heading: Great placement, average infrastructure, and a peaceful campus.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities provided by our college are below average. The main CSE building, Golden Jubilee Bhavan, and the admin block are great, but the rest of the buildings are pretty average. For freshers, they conduct classes in the Polymer Science building, whose classrooms are pretty bad. They really need to improve it.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STUReviewed on 7 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good to go. Need to concentrate more on placements than the attendance and just the book knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is above average. Each class had projectors and all labs had fast internet connection. Coming to the hostel, I'll rate it 3.5. The food is sometimes good and sometimes bad. Gymnasium is good. Importance is given to sports and physical education.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STUReviewed on 1 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in Mysore, if you are willing to do MCA.
reviews.review_text: SJCE provides a very good infrastructure for MCA students. Our department had Wi-Fi-enabled labs, updated computer systems, spacious classrooms, a digital library, and access to the main library with thousands of books and journals. Hostel facilities were decent with clean rooms, study areas, indoor games, and 24/7 security. The mess food was manageable, and the canteen options were better with snacks and meals available throughout the day. The campus also has sports grounds, a health center, gy...

reviews.review_heading: JSS Science and Technology Mysuru review and 2026 placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is good. Since this is an old established college, the infrastructure is outdated compared to other colleges through CET or COMEDK. It is an old-styled college. But the hostel facilities are very good, as the hostels are newly built.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STUReviewed on 29 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent here, and the students have a good environment for studying. A good number of playgrounds are present for sports. I am not a hosteller, so I do not have a good idea about hostels, but its good. Wi-Fi is accessible throughout the college.

reviews.review_heading: Well-maintained campus and a smart, ready campus for engineers.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure, green and clean smart campus, Wi-Fi available. Good and large library with digitalised and modern computers. A large and silent reference hall for studying. Hostel rooms are large and spacious with 24-hour electricity and water supply, and food in the mess is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STUReviewed on 28 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: An excellent college and a good presentation.
reviews.review_text: Buildings are huge and available for almost 500 students. Hostel facilities are kind of good, but the food facilities are at an average level. They have park grounds and fitness and physical facilities. Our hostel is eco-friendly projecting various plants and wildlife.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STUReviewed on 28 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am really satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: I also live in a hostel that is inside the college, and the food provided is okay, kind of average and the rooms are pretty clean. The Wi-Fi provided here is pretty fast, and there is also a garden, and playgrounds are provided for students to play. And all the labs are well-equipped with new equipment and study materials.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college in Mysore for engineering.
reviews.review_text: Our college is spread over in one or two acres, which is a massive area for our infrastructure. The new buildings have amazing throat. This year, it is one of the best campuses in Mysore with all types of facilities, including well-equipped libraries, playground and labs with the latest equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for engineering in Mysuru with modern, huge and green campus.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good with all basic facilities and services available like Wi-Fi enabled campus, digital library, sport grounds, gym, prayer hall with greenery and cleanliness maintained all around campus. Hostel is good at the price they offer with decent food, as everyone’s taste differs.

reviews.review_heading: Review of JSS Science and Technology University, Mysore.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and college infrastructure are good, but the building is now outdated because it is an old-established college. This college was established around the 1970s. The campus is well-maintained, and it's a lush green campus, and you get full campus Wi-Fi coverage.

reviews.review_heading: If you are on the right path, the college helps you a lot by giving many opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our campus are good. The only problem is that there are no charging ports in classroom benches. Labs and libraries are well-equipped. We have three types of libraries in our college. First is the normal library, where we can find many books. Second is the digital library, where we can access soft copies of books. Third is the reference library, where we can also find books.

reviews.review_heading: JSS Science and Technology University, Mysuru 2026 placement. SJCE placements review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for this college is good, but this college was established in 1970, so the infrastructure is outdated. The condition of the hostel for both boys and girls is good. The campus is full of lush greenery, and the crowd is also good, and the campus is surrounded by Wi-Fi.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STUReviewed on 16 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The best college in our city.
reviews.review_text: The college has facilitated two hostels for students, our hostel has good facilities and Wi-Fi. The course here is academically excellent, providing good technical domain knowledge to students. Our college has the best infrastructure in the city, it has several playgrounds, labs with the latest instruments etc.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about JSS Science and Technology University

likes.text: Top companies like Visa, Cisco, Intel, TCS, Accenture, Cognizant, Sixt, Benz, etc., visit our college for placements.
Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, also known as SJCE has got some good placement opportunities.

Most teachers are qualified with Masters and many with Ph.D. The course curriculum is well-designed as it doesn't come under VTU.

likes.text: We also have various clubs like LCC, IEE, GRAVITY, GDSC, SAHAS, Beauro club, etc., for various academic and non-academic activities to enhance our knowledge and opportunities.
A fest called Jayciana held in our college is very popular all over Mysore.

college_info.intro:
Raffles Design International Mumbai provides various diploma, advanced diploma, and UG programmes affiliated with Raffles College of Higher Education and Coventry University UK. The institute provides around 20 courses. Some of these courses include
1. A Diploma in Fashion Design
2. An Advanced Diploma in Fashion Design
3. BA. (Hons) in Fashion Design
4. A Diploma in Interior Design
5. An Advanced Diploma in Interior Design
6. A BA (Hons) in Interior Design
7. Diploma in Product Design
8. Advanced Diploma in Product Design
9. BA (Hons) in Product Design, etc.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: The details regarding Raffles Design International courses, fees, and eligibility are mentioned below:

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Raffles Design International Mumbai admission to all the courses is merit-based. Applicants are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria and apply online on the official website. The final seat allotment is based on the last qualifying mark score. The college offers direct admission based on the last qualifying marks scores.
faqs.question: Can I apply for admission to Raffles Design International, Mumbai without any entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    Raffles Design International Mumbai offers BA under nine specialisations,  some of the specialisations are BA (Hon) in Interior Design, BA (Hons) in Fashion Design, BA (Hons.) in Product Design, BA (Hons) in Visual Communication Design, BA (Hons) in Digital Media Design, etc. The total tuition fee for a BA at Raffles Design Mumbai is INR 19 Lakh for three years. Additionally, the application fee is INR 3,500 (non-refundable).

reviews_list.batch_info: Advanced Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Our college trains students for the future design world.

review_content.Placements: Due to the pandemic, it has been difficult to get a placement but the college has been supportive about getting work from home. There has been a list of companies that the college has provided us with. This helps us getting in touch with firms to get an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The quality of the facilities provided is pretty good. There are facilities like a PC lab, good Wi-Fi, drafting boards, workshops for product design, and we also had the equipment required while dealing with physical models. There is safety ensured at all times. The college is also a very clean and hygienic place to be in.

reviews_list.batch_info: Advanced Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: The course offers a detailed explanation of all the subjects.

review_content.Placements: 100% of the students got an internship. Almost all the important subjects are offered by them. Space planning, layout, materials, budget and costing, Office, hospitality, retail, residential design are been thought. The course offers a detailed explanation of all the subjects.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and the facilities provided by the college is perfect. AC classrooms, Wi-Fi, workshop, labs, library, xerox machine. So that the students won't have to go out. Students enjoy studying on the campus. The classrooms are very well maintained so the students can work without any hesitation.

faqs.answer: If you wish to pursue the course of BA Hons from Raffles International Mumbai, then you need to be atleast 18 years old in age.Score at least 65% passing marks in both class 10 & 12 and 6.2 in IELTS or 525 in TOEFL.Showcase at least 5 pieces of work, depending on the field of interest, through your portfolio.
faqs.question: Q: Who is eligible for Raffles International Mumbai BA (Hons)?

faqs.answer: Yes, Raffles Design International Mumbai offers merit-based admission to all its courses. To be eligible for admission, candidates must fill out the basic eligibility i.e. pass Class 10 and Class 12 from a recognised board. After filling out the criteria applicants must apply on the official website of the college.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission at Raffles Design International, Mumbai?

faqs.answer: For admission to the BA Program at Raffles Design International Mumbai, you need to be at least 18 years of age. Besides that, pass class 12 with a minimum of 65% aggregate. Now, go to the official college website for the online application process.Upload your documents & pay the application fees.For more information on the admission process for the BA program at Raffles Design International, you can visit the official website of the college.

review_summary.college_name: Raffles Design International Mumbai Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Advanced Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good teaching, placements and infrastructure facilities.

content.Placements: Raffles is a great place in terms of design teaching, conceptualization and originality. For internships, it provides a list of design companies that have hired students from Raffles in the past, which becomes an advantage for current students. Presently in this pandemic, every interior design student has managed to secure a suitable position in a reputable firm.
content.Infrastructure: Currently, Raffles is situated on the ground floor of WeWork, providing all the facilities like a coffee vending machine, Wi-Fi, centralised air-conditioning and miscellaneous things as basic stationery. It maintains a clean, healthy and pest-free environment. It does not provide hostel facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Advanced Diploma in Fashion Design - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good learning experience.

content.Placements: Most of the students got internships because of the help of faculty members. Internships give an idea as to what to expect in the industry. Designer and merchandiser are some of the popular roles that we apply for as a student of fashion design. The course is very helpful in giving me a boost to start my own business.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very well-equipped for the fashion design course. It is well maintained, and we get the appropriate training to use the equipment needed for course. Classrooms are very convenient, and the library is adequately equipped to deal with our course. Proper printing facilities and Wi-Fi ensures ease of doing work in the classroom.

individual_reviews.course: Advanced Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college trains students for the future design world.

content.Placements: Due to the pandemic, it has been difficult to get a placement but the college has been supportive about getting work from home. There has been a list of companies that the college has provided us with. This helps us getting in touch with firms to get an internship.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of the facilities provided is pretty good. There are facilities like a PC lab, good Wi-Fi, drafting boards, workshops for product design, and we also had the equipment required while dealing with physical models. admission_process.title: Raffles Design International Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Raffles Design International Mumbai admission is purely merit-based for all UG, diploma and certificate courses. To be eligible for admission, applicants must have a minimum qualification of Class 10 and Class 12. Applicants willing to apply for any must apply online by visiting Raffles Design International Mumbai official website for admission. Students can pursue various programmes, such as Dual International Certificate, Advanced Diploma in Business Management, a Bachelor's degree in Business Management from Singapore or Australia. Read the below article to learn more about theRaffles Design International Mumbai admission process 2025:
The key highlights related to Raffles Design International Mumbai admission 2025 in the table below:
Particulars
Raffles Design International Admission 2025 Highlights
Mode of study
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered

Raffles Design International Mumbai provides diplomas, advance diploma, short-term certificates and other courses.The table below presents the qualifying examination/Selection criteria and the eligibility criteria for admission to the programmes offered at Raffles Design International Mumbai:
Course Name
Certificate
Candidate must have cleared Class 10 with at least 65% passing marks
- IETLS score of 5.5 for Diploma, or TOEFL (Internet-based) 46
- Candidate must have a portfolio with at least 5 pieces of work, depending on the field of interest
Advanced Diploma
- Candidate must have completed 16 Years of age.
- Candidate must have cleared Class 10 with at least 65% passing marks.
- IETLS score of 5.5 for Diploma, or TOEFL (Internet-based) 46.
- Portfolio with at least 5 pieces of work, depending on field of interest.
Merit-Based

Raffles Design International Mumbai admission is both entrance and merit-based. Candidates seeking admission have to complete each of the admission stages for admission. Find below more details on the Raffles Design International Mumbai admission procedures:
STEP 1: Raffles Design International Mumbai Application Process 2025

The institute accepts applications via online modes. For online applications, aspirants can visit the institute's official website. To apply successfully, the application fee must be paid within the due date.
STEP 2: Raffles Design International Mumbai Selection Round

After applying, the admission panel examines the candidates based on their scores in TOEFL or IELTS. Apart from this candidate's age, qualifying exam score & portfolio as per the field of interest are also examined.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Selected students can pay the required amount of Raffles Design International Mumbai fee to confirm their seats.

paragraphs: Somaiya School of Design, supported by Riidl admissions 2025are open. Candidates can apply for admission to UG programme in Design, i.e., BDes. Somaiya School of Design, supported by Riidl admission is completely entrance-based. The accepted entrance exams for admission to BDes programme are UCEED, NID DAT, NIFT, PERA-CET, NATA, JEE Main Paper 2 entrance exams. Moreover,Somaiya School of Design, supported by Riidlalso accepts its in-house entrance exam, namely SVUET. Read on for more details around Somaiya School of Design, supported by Riidl admission 2025 are elaborated in the article below.

Somaiya School of Design, supported by Riidl coursesare offered at UG level. Candidates need to meet the basic eligibility requirements to qualify the admission process. Tabulated below are the eligibility and selection criteria for Somaiya School of Design, supported by Riidl course admission:
SVUET /UCEED/NID DAT/ NIFT /PERA-CET/NATA/JEE Main Paper 2/Design Aptitude Test/Essay Writing/Team Activity/Personal Interview

Candidates seeking to join Somaiya School of Design, supported by Riidl need to ensure that they meet the admission criteria of the course as specified by the college. Students must follow the multi-step admission process that includes application/ registration, followed by selection rounds and admission confirmation. The application process for the institute commences online via the official website of the college. The detailed steps forSomaiya School of Design, supported by Riidl admission processare as follows:
Step 1: Application Process

Somaiya School of Design application processis conducted in an online mode only. Candidates must fill out the application form by visiting the official website of the institute (https://ssd.somaiya.edu). Moreover, the application fee for a full-time UG programme is INR 500.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Somaiya School of Design, supported by Riidl admissions are entrance-based. Candidates can either qualify for any one of the entrance exams like UCEED, NID DAT, NIFT, PERA-CET, NATA & JEE Main Paper 2. Else, candidates can qualify for SVUET exam with a valid score. faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Architecture -Navi Mumbai for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Architecture -Navi Mumbai has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.VocCandidate should have passed 10+2 from any government recognised board.UG DiplomaCandidate should have passed 10+2 from any government recognised board.B.ArchCandidate who have passed 10+3 Diploma Examination with Mathematics as compulsory subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate from a recognized Institute/ University can also apply.

reviews.review_heading: Bvcoa review - architecture college.
reviews.review_text: The college building is really basic and doesn't look like an architecture college. Wi-Fi and labs are good. Studios are also great. Hostel infrastructure is deteriorating, and mess food is not good. Medical facilities are not available on the campus. Lights are also not there on the campus after dark.

reviews.review_heading: The college is great and has the best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are clean. Toilets are cleaned every day. The library has around 1,000 books that are very helpful. The hostel is average. The canteen serves delicious food. A lot of physical activities, like workshops and sports, are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bharati Vidyapeeth’s College of Architecture -Navi Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: The building is old but quite well managed. The hostel is too good. Our canteen is the best place to hang out. We celebrate each day here. Our hostel is the best here. Connecting with seniors and learning all of it is the best. I had my best experience in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Great exposure for the students but lack good facilities and communication.
reviews.review_text: Overall facilities are not that great. We have cameras in maximum classrooms that is great. We have Wi-Fi but it's never working. Library, seminar room, computer lab and stationery shop all are available. Toilets don't have proper lights and maximum times it's unclean. Drinking water and canteen is also there. Quality of food is okay.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities are awesome and college get big opportunity for placement because of faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Bharati vidyapeeth college has best and also good infrastructure is good and have all the necessary facilities available hostels are also quite good and well maintained food is also very good and hygienic classrooms are also quite good and maintained.

Accredited by the National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC) with an A+ grade, the Hindusthan College of Arts and Science was established in 1998. The college has secured accreditation from bharathia univerasity for 33 Under Graduate Programmes, 16 Post Graduate Programmes, 10 Research Centers, 3 Diploma and 2 Certification. individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Computer Science course.

content.Placements: 95-100% placement is available. The highest salary offered is 16 LPA, and the minimum and average salary is 3 LPA and 10 LPA, respectively. Top recruiters are Citibank, Zynga, HDFC Bank, etc. Top roles offered are IT Consultant, Data Analyst, etc. 90% of students get internship opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is terrible. The classrooms and halls are well-equipped. There are separate departments for each course. There are more than 20 conference halls hosting events and competitions, where students studying various subjects, organize competitions and other events. Several facilities have been developed for sports and other activities.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Information Technology Course.

content.Placements: 62% and 83% of students were placed. The pay scale is 11 LPA to 25 LPA. Data analysts and software engineers are among the positions available. The lowest wage provided is 7 LPA, while the highest income is 33 LPA. We provide good placements at our college. Informatica, Cyberark, Splunk, and others are top recruiters. 70% of students find internships.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are equipped with modern audio-visual technology. Wi-Fi facilities are available on campus. There are two hotels that are well maintained. Dedicated workstations are equipped with appropriate software and equipment, allowing for hands-on operation. There is also a cricket/football field as well as basketball and all sports.

content.Placements: Our portfolio determines where we are placed. We receive 95% placement help from our college. Because it pertains to experience, it is beneficial rather than comforting. admission_process.title: HCAS Chennai Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai admission 2025 is open.Affiliated to theUniversity of Madras,Hindustan College of Arts & Science (HCAS), Chennai is a part of the Hindustan Group of Institutions.HCAS admission is merit-based and registrations for online admission to HCAS are open as per its official website.The college offers 17 undergraduate, seven postgraduate, three MPhil, and two PhD programmes in varied fields such asScience, Commerce,Humanities,Management,Information Technology, etc.HCAS Chennaialso offers distance education in some of the PG programmes such as MBA, MSc, and MCA.

For UG, PG, and Research courses, candidates must have completed their Class 12, graduation, and post-graduation, respectively. It also offers some add-on courses along with some of its UG/ PG courses. HCAS Admission to most of the offered programmes is merit-based. Therefore. candidates must qualify for the eligibility criteria. Find below theHCAS Chennai courseseligibility/selection criteria for admission 2025:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai fees range from INR 50,000 to INR 2 lakh. Candidates are required to pay the fee once their application form is verified and approved. The college also offers merit scholarships to its students. Find below the course-wise fees for 2025:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
For admission toHCAS courses, candidates must complete the multi-step admission procedure which is completely online. Find below the detailed steps:
Step 1: Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai Application

Candidates must visitHindustan College's official websiteto apply. The application process begins with a new registration, which requires candidates to sign-upon the official website of the college. After registration, candidates can access the application form.
Step 2: Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai Shortlisting

Eligible applications will be shortlisted for the further admission process. Shortlisting is done based on the performance in the candidate's last qualifying exam. Shortlisted candidates will receive a confirmation mail. Now candidates can make the fee payment to finalise the admission,
Step 3: Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai Documents Verifications
Candidates will have to visit the college office for document verification. The date and time will be mailed.

faqs.question: Can I join Hindustan College of Arts and Science directly?
faqs.answer: The college provides diverse undergraduate programs in fields like arts, science, commerce, management, and computer applications. Admission to Hindustan College of Arts and Science is based on merit, considering the entrance exam marks along with Plus Two / HSC / Intermediate / equivalent examinations marks, etc. Hindustan University offers admission to all of its courses based on a valid score in the respective entrance exams, so it is not possible to join Hindustan College of Arts and Science directly. Candidates can visit the official website of the Hindusthan College of Arts and Science to apply for admission through both online and offline modes

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Computer Science course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is terrible. The classrooms and halls are well-equipped. There are separate departments for each course. There are more than 20 conference halls hosting events and competitions, where students studying various subjects, organize competitions and other events. Several facilities have been developed for sports and other activities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Information Technology Course.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are equipped with modern audio-visual technology. Wi-Fi facilities are available on campus. There are two hotels that are well maintained. Dedicated workstations are equipped with appropriate software and equipment, allowing for hands-on operation. There is also a cricket/football field as well as basketball and all sports.

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive campus experience with good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college offers spacious classrooms, advanced labs, and a well-stocked library. Hostel facilities are clean, with 24/7 water, Wi-Fi, and security. The mess serves hygienic food, and recreational areas create a comfortable living and learning environment.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for M.Sc. in Applied Microbiology Course.
reviews.review_text: The hotels were well run; Wi-Fi was installed, and classrooms and libraries were also maintained. Overall, materials and equipment are above average. The food in the mess and restaurant was good and suited our taste. The stadium was good too, with games to play.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Computer Science course.
reviews.review_text: Hindustan College of Arts and Science is world-class and evergreen and offers a pollution-free environment. Our college provides good lab facilities with good internet and Wi-Fi facilities which enables students to enjoy their practice sessions. Our college offers clean food and has good medical facilities, as well as experienced doctors. Our college encourages students who are passionate about sports.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best college for M.Sc. in the computer science course.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities like Wi-Fi in classrooms, computer labs, and a library for the students. The college has provided laptops to all the students. The hostel is good in terms of infrastructure, and the food served is also good. A medical laboratory is located in our college, and various sports events are also held.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best college for M.Sc. in computer science courses.
reviews.review_text: This college is well-maintained and one of the best colleges in India. Campus is excellent, and the location is suitable for students. This college is well-equipped. Classrooms are well-equipped. Wi-Fi system is also good, and connectivity is provided. It also has a library. For boys, there is a separate hostel named management hostel, for girls. They go to triveni complex. It also offers a good riot, a dedicated student health center, and sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best college for the M.Sc. in Information Technology course.
reviews.review_text: Our college has first-rate facilities. Every course at our college has its own computer. There is Wi-Fi at our college. The design of the classrooms is requisite. The hostel is excellent. The hotel's cuisine is good. Good food is served in the restaurant. Clinics are available at our college. Participation in extracurricular activities and sports is encouraged among students.

reviews.review_heading: My opinion on my college.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members are good, and they are very friendly with all students except one or two. Other things like the library, classroom, and others are good. The hostel is very bad. They will only take fees from us, but everything will be bad, like food and other things. They will only provide a room and food for the highest fees (₹25,000 per month) I have ever paid for a hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best college for M.Sc. in Information Technology Course.
reviews.review_text: My course has amazing materials. Wi-Fi and air conditioning are accessible in all classrooms. There is plenty of computer space, classrooms are very large and pleasant, and libraries are available for departments. Good eating is convenient and straightforward. A reputable clinic operates around the clock. Sports and games play an important role.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for M.Sc. In Information Technology Course.
reviews.review_text: The laboratories and classrooms were clean and well-equipped. The hostel provides all amenities such as a gym, Wi-Fi, and a game area, as well as all sports equipment. The quality of mess meals is average. Our college has two libraries, one for the MBA, medical department, and the other for the Information Technology branch, and both have all of the texts available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for M.Sc. in Information Technology Course.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are superb. We pay special attention to facilities such as a state-of-the-art library and a clinic for students and professors. Classrooms are outfitted with ventilated displays. We have around 5 large and small canteens with average meal quality. The hostel rooms are lovely, the old ones livable, and the modern ones ideal.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it was best college for the MSc in Computer Science course.
reviews.review_text: College had best infrastructure I have ever seen or experienced. College management met all of pupils fundamental needs. Other advanced features include classrooms with smart boards, electricity, and internet access. College settings and environs were maintained on a daily basis. Pleasant setting for mental wellness and concentration.

college_info.intro:
SGBAU Amravati popular programmes are BTech and BSc. BTech and BSc students are placed in top companies in top sectors. BTech students are given technical knowledge and are trained in advanced technology. The aim of the university is to build a strong research and teaching environment for students. BTech and BSc students are provided with various facilities such as a Research lab, Computer Science Society, Training and Placement Cell, and others.
Overall, Sant Gadge Baba Amravati is one of the top universities offering quality education to students. BTech students can also go for non-technical fields such as Sales, Marketing, and others. Check out the below video to know more:

faqs.answer: A:    Pursuing the BA degree designed by SGBAU provides graduates with a broad career scope. After completion of this programme, BA graduates can pursue different career paths such as Social worker, Teacher, Content Writer, and more. Each career path helps students achieve attractive earnings. Mentioned below is a list of various job profiles for BA degree holders to pursue and their corresponding average salaries:Journalist: INR 3 LPA to INR 5.5 LPATeacher: INR 4 LPA to INR 6.5 lakhHuman Resour

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University does provide placement support to students officially pursuing any programme from the university. For helping the students, the university has established a placement cell. The cell maintains strategic relations with many reputed companies to provide quality on-campus placement opportunities. Apart from this, the placement cell serves as a catalyst for training and skill enhancement of students.
faqs.question: Does SGBAU provide placement support and training to its students?

faqs.answer: A:    As per information collated from official sources, Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University offers a BA programme via more than 10 affiliated colleges. Thus, the university boasts a high number of seats for admission to BA courses. Among all the colleges/institutes, Gulamnabi Azhad Arts Commerce College has the highest intake, with 3,480 seats.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: We will find that the subject they are teaching in the course is useless.

review_content.Placements: Not every student gets placed. The chance of getting placed is almost 30-40 percent. The highest package offered ranges from 12-14 LPA, and the average package ranges from 3-4 LPA. The lowest package offered to students is 1 LPA, which is not good in this economy. It is very hard to get a placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: There was no hostel in college when I joined. The infrastructure needs to improve. Classrooms are of an old type, like houses in the old Japanese movies. The campus doesn't feel like we are in college, and it needs to improve a lot in the next few years.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: If you are from Amravati then definitely go through this college.

review_content.Placements: First of all BCA means Bachelor in Computer Applications. This course is completed in 3 years. The average package offer is a minimum of 3 to 4 LPA and I think so the highest package is 7 LPA. Percentage matter atleast CGPA above 6 or 6.5, which means 65 to 60 percent.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good facilities are provided by our college, including good classroom high tech Wi-Fi technology brilliant computer labs. In our library there are all types of books present. In the hostels the food is also good and of good quality. We have good sports opportunities in our college.

overview_faqs.question: How much does MBA at SGBAU cost?
overview_faqs.answer: SGBAU Amravati has 30 departments that offer certificate, undergraduate, graduate, and PhD level programmes in science, engineering, management, business, education, the arts, law, and lifelong learning. It offers a 2 years MBA programme with specializations in Financial Management, Marketing Management, Human Resources Management, Production and Operations Management. The total fees for the MBA programme at SGBAU is INR 80,600. A bachelor's degree in any field with at least 50% of the required courses completed is required for entrance to the MBA program.You can read more information about the MBA programme at Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University on the following site - https://www.shiksha.com/university/sant-gadge-baba-amravati-university-22416/courses

review_summary.college_name: SGBAU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I suggest students get admission here.

content.Placements: I am a 2nd year student, so I don't know that much. Students should score upto 6.5 or 6 CGPA to be eligible for an interview in my course. The lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA, and the highest salary package offered is 9 LPA in my course. Faculty members try to give internships to many students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is very good. All facilities are provided, such as labs, classrooms, and a library. There are smart boards in all classrooms. Food available in the canteen and mess is good. Medical facilities are also provided. Students are able to play games here.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College infrastructure, canteen and hostel facilities are the best. Faculty is the best.

content.Placements: 30-40% students are placed. On the institute level, more than a few hundred students are working abroad in more than 150 countries. The environment here so good as it is in the outskirts of the city. There are trees, a garden, and many more things.
content.Infrastructure: Badminton court, table tennis court, chess boards and playing zone, carrom boards and playing zone, cricket, volleyball, basketball, football, Kabaddi. The college canteen provides decent food at affordable prices. Mess food is the best. Just Rs. 60 unlimited thali, with proper salad, Dal, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: We will find that the subject they are teaching in the course is useless.

content.Placements: Not every student gets placed. The chance of getting placed is almost 30-40 percent. The highest package offered ranges from 12-14 LPA, and the average package ranges from 3-4 LPA. The lowest package offered to students is 1 LPA, which is not good in this economy. It is very hard to get a placement.
content.Infrastructure: There was no hostel in college when I joined. The infrastructure needs to improve. Classrooms are of an old type, like houses in the old Japanese movies. The campus doesn't feel like we are in college, and it needs to improve a lot in the next few years.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: If you are from Amravati then definitely go through this college.

content.Placements: First of all BCA means Bachelor in Computer Applications. This course is completed in 3 years. The average package offer is a minimum of 3 to 4 LPA and I think so the highest package is 7 LPA. Percentage matter atleast CGPA above 6 or 6.5, which means 65 to 60 percent.
content.Infrastructure: Good facilities are provided by our college, including good classroom high tech Wi-Fi technology brilliant computer labs. In our library there are all types of books present. In the hostels the food is also good and of good quality. We have good sports opportunities in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college with helpful faculty, placements, and modern facilities.

content.Placements: The placement process in our college is decent and improving every year. Placement eligibility criteria require a minimum of 60 percent throughout academics. Around 60 percent or more students from our course get placed every year. The lowest package offered is around 3 LPA, and the highest package goes up to 7–8 LPA, depending on skills and performance. The average package is around 4–5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include ISRO, Infosys, TCS, Tata, Mahindra, and other IT and core companies. Many students also get internship opportunities during their course.

admission_overview.college_name: SGBAU Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Application Process

admission_process.title: SGBAU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SGBAU admissionto various UG, PG, diploma, certification and PhD courses is through online mode. Interested candidates can apply by filling out the application forms available on the official website. Through its 27 departments of study, the university offers a total of 941 courses in streams likeEngineering, Science, Management, Commerce, Education, Law and Library Information Science.Read the following article to learn about the courses, eligibility, and admission procedure ofSant Gadge Baba Amravati University.

SGBAU course admissionis subject to fulfilment of the course-specific admission criteria. The university offers a wide range of courses across multiple specialisations. Admission to different courses is either based on merit or on the valid scores of national/state-level entrance exams. The university for many courses grants admission through Common Admission Programme (CAP). Check out the following table to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularSGBAU courses:

The total tuition fee for SGBAU is inclusive of multiple components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee, medical insurance, security deposit, and more. Some of the components need to be paid only once at the time of admission, while the remaining components are charged either semester-wise/ yearly.SGBAU feeranges betweenINR 4,000andINR 4.6 lakh. The fee varies depending on the programme and specialisation selected by the student. Interested students can look at the following table to know about the Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University:

Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University seat intakevaries as per the programme and specialisation selected by the students. The university offers seats through its various affiliated colleges. In order to confirm your seat at the university, students are required to pay the admission fee. Check out the below table to know the seat intake for some of the popular programmes offered at SGBAU:
Course Name
Note: This information is taken from official sources and is subjective.

Admission to Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University is a multi-step process that involves application, selection, and admission confirmation. Students are required to clear the admission criteria before applying for the programme of choice. The university offers admissions through the Centralised Admission Programme for some of its programmes. Check out the following steps to complete theSGBAU admission process:
Step 1: SGBAU Application Process
Visit the official website of the university and apply for the programme of choice. Duly fill in the application form by providing the required details and uploading the specified documents.
Step 2: SGBAU Selection Process

SGBAU shortlists students based on several parameters, such as entrance exam scores, past academic qualifications, etc. Students must appear and clear the course-specific entrance test to be eligible for admission. Seat allotment for certain programmes is done through counselling conducted by the concerned authority.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Selected candidates must pay the admission fee and go through document verification to secure their spot at the university.

placement_data.title: SGBAU Amravati Placement overview
paragraphs: What’s new at SGBAU placements 2023? SGBAU placement report 2023 is not released. However, according to Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during SGBAU UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements 2022 stood at INR 2.11 LPA and INR 2.40 LPA , respectively. Further, a total of 18 students were placed out of 44 students during SGBAU UG 4-year placements 2022.
SGBAU Placements 2022

data: SGBAU Placements 2022 A fall of over 45% was witnessed in the UG 4-year median package offered in 2022 as compared with 2021 A fall of nearly 33% was witnessed in the PG 2-year median package offered in 2022 as compared with 2021

faqs.question: Does SGBAU offer better placements than PKDV?
faqs.answer: The median package offered for SGBAU's UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements in 2022 was INR 2.11 LPA and INR 2.40 LPA, respectively, according to Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University's NIRF report 2023. Additionally, at the SGBAU UG 4-year placements in 2022, a total of 18 students were placed out of 44 students. The largest package (12 LPA) in the placement drive of 2022 was recorded by PDKV Akola. Top employers include Reliance Foundation, Mahindra, IFFCO, Bayer Crop Science, and others. Hence, PKDV has a better placement cell and placement opportunities.

faqs.question: Which affiliated college of Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University has the highest seat intake for BCom?
faqs.answer: As per information sources from official sources, Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University has more than 10 affiliated colleges offering the BCom programme. Thus, in total the university has 26,332 seats available for BCom. Among all the colleges/institutes, Shri Mithulalji Kacholiya Commerce And Shri Satyanarayanji Ramkrushnaji Rathi Science College has the highest intake with 1,080 seats.

faqs.question: Does SGBAU provide placement support and training to its students?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University does provide placement support to students officially pursuing any programme from the university. For helping the students, the university has established a placement cell. The cell maintains strategic relations with many reputed companies to provide quality on-campus placement opportunities. Apart from this, the placement cell serves as a catalyst for training and skill enhancement of students.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters for BCom programme at SGBAU?
faqs.answer: As per the official website of SGBAU, the placement cell of the university maintains good relations with reputed organisations. As per the student reviews, many top recruiters have visited the university's campus for recruiting students enrolled in the BCom programme. Some of the top recruiters sourced from student reviews are TCS, Wipro, AD Electronics, and more.

average_package.title: SGBAU Average Package 2023

faqs.question: Can Dhoot Transmission and Bajaj Electricals be considered as some of the top recruiters of SGBAU?
faqs.answer: Candidates might get respectable placement possibilities at Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University. Campus placement drives are open to students in their final year of study. In addition to placing students, the institution offers internships in a number of companies, such as Dotcom, JK Innovation, Mindspark, Webveer Technology, Maestro, and others. SGBAU placements' salient features include the following: The highest CTC available to applicants is between INR 8 and INR 9 Lacs per annum. While the lowest CTC offered to candidates is approximately INR 2.4 LPA, the average CTC offered to candidates is approximately INR 3 LPA. Among the top employers are Amazon, Backend, Apsara Chemicals, Dhoot Transmission, Bajaj Electricals, and Bigbasket. Among the industries in which students were placed were the automotive, IT, software, transportation, construction, education, and clinical research sectors.

faqs.question: How much does MBA at SGBAU cost?
faqs.answer: SGBAU Amravati has 30 departments that offer certificate, undergraduate, graduate, and PhD level programmes in science, engineering, management, business, education, the arts, law, and lifelong learning. It offers a 2 years MBA programme with specializations in Financial Management, Marketing Management, Human Resources Management, Production and Operations Management. The total fees for the MBA programme at SGBAU is INR 80,600. A bachelor's degree in any field with at least 50% of the required courses completed is required for entrance to the MBA program. You can read more information about the MBA programme at Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University on the following site - https://www.shiksha.com/university/sant-gadge-baba-amravati-university-22416/courses

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fees to pursue BSc from SGBAU?
faqs.answer: Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University BSc fee structure is a composition of multiple fee components. Out of all, one of the prominent fee components is the tuition fees. As per the structure, the total tuition fees for BSc amount to INR 31,600 . Students willing to know the complete fee structure can visit the official website of the university. Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.

faqs.question: Which affiliated college of SGBAU Amravati has the highest seat intake for MBA?
faqs.answer: SGBAU Amravati offers an MBA programme via one constituent and four affiliated colleges. Some of the colleges affiliated with the university are PR Patil College of Engineering And Technology (PRPCET), Vidya Prasarini Sabhas Arts, and more. Out of all, Prof. Ram Meghe Institute of Technology and Research offers the highest number of MBA seats, i.e., 120 .

The COMEDK UGET 2026 registration last date for Garden City University Bangalore admission to the BE/BTech programme has been extended till Mar 20, 2026. Also, the COMEDK UGET exam 2026 will be held on May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
Garden City University comprises 9 schools of study, including Science, Social Studies, Health Science, Engineering, etc. The affiliated colleges and schools of the university offer a wide range of courses at the UG, PG, PhD, and Certificate programmes, across various streams. MBA, BTech, and BSc are some of the most popular programmes.
Garden City University Bangalore offers a full-time, 4-year BTech course at the UG level. The BTech programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of Computer Science, Information Technology, Robotics, etc. The BSc programme offered by GCU Bangalore is a three-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including Biotechnology, Forensic Science, Food Science and Technology, Data Science, Visual Communication, etc. Below mentioned are the Garden City University's popular programmes:

Interested students must fill out the online application for the respective courses on the official website of the university. review_content.Placements: Since my current batch has still not passed out, passing out batches have around 65 to 70% placement. review_content.Infrastructure: Campus is equipped with good Wi-Fi facilities, and labs consist of necessary equipment for examinations. Classrooms are spacious, though I feel they could do with some added ventilation. Library has a large variety of books and computers on various topics and is peaceful for research and reading. Girls' and boys' hostels come in various sharing options. They are well-maintained, spacious, and have individual lockers and study tables for each student. Common washrooms and separate ones, and no issue with the plumbing and electricity.

admission_process.title: Garden City University Admission Process

paragraphs: Garden City University admission for academic session 2024-2025 is open. Garden City University offers admission to various UG and PG courses such as BTech, BCA, BCom, BSc, MBA, MSc, etc., in the stream of Engineering, Commerce, Science, Management, etc. Garden City University admission to these courses is both merit and entrance-based. Interested students can visit the official website ofGarden City Universityto apply for the course of their choice.

Garden City University accepts national-level exams such as JEE Main, COMEDK, KCET, etc for admission to its BTech programme. For other programmes admission is subject to the last qualifying exams. Check below City University course along with eligibility and selection criteria for the Garden:
UG degree with 50% aggregate in the respective discipline, including language from a recognised university

Class 12 with 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category) in Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational
KCET/JEE Main/COMED K

*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Garden City Universityfeesfor all courses vary depending on the duration and type of the course that candidates choose. The fees range from INR 1 lakh to INR 14 lakh for the courses offered. Candidates must pay a caution deposit of INR 5000 along with fees. Find below the course-wise fees for Garden City University 2024:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
To get admission at Garden City University candidates must follow the entire admission procedure of the Garden City University. Find below the admission process for Garden City University 2024:
Step 1: Garden City Registration

Candidates must visit the official website(https://admissions.gardencity.university/)to register at the university's official website. Candidates must provide a valid email and phone number to register.
Step 2: Garden City Application process

The application process is completely online, which is available at the university's official website. Candidates must fill out the application form with all the required details. While submitting the form candidates must pay an amount of INR 2000 as an application fee.
Step 3: Garden City Conditional Offer Letter

The submitted application form will be scrutinised based on the eligibility criteria. Shortlisted candidates will receive an offer letter, where all the conditions required for the course's admission will be mentioned. Candidates must meet all the conditions mentioned in the Conditional Offer Letter.
Step 4: Garden City University Provisional Admission Letter
Once candidates meet all the conditions mentioned in the 'Conditional Offer Letter' they can obtain the enrollment letter. Candidates can now pay the course fee and finalise their seats.

faqs.answer: Garden City University BTech cutoff 2023 for Computer Science Engineering was 76208 for SC and 76208 for ST category. While the admissions are based on the scores/rank obtained in COMEDK, the last cut offs also change a lot depending on All India quota or Home State. It also varies if the applicant is a female.

faqs.question: What will happen if someone misses the internal exam at Garden City University?
faqs.answer: If a student misses the internal examination of Garden City University, then they will have to submit an application. If there are Medical reasons involved, then students must submit the Medical certificate. The students will have to give the internal exams again as passing in internal examinations is mandatory.

courses_data.name: Garden City University Bangalore MSc Admissions
courses_data.description: Garden City University offers a two-year postgraduate degree MSc. The programme is spread across four semesters which is under multiple specialisations, includingBiotechnology,Forensics,Microbiology, etc. Admission is merit-based. Read on to know more about the Garden City University Msc programme.

faqs.question: How to get admission to MSc course at Garden City University?
faqs.answer: Only those candidates who have passed graduation and have received bachelor's in BSc are eligible to apply for admission to the MSc course at Garden City University. As per the selection process for MSc at Garden City University, there are no requirements to qualify for any entrance examination. Admissions are offered to various courses based on the merit of the last qualifying examination. To know the complete details for the Garden City University MSc course,click here.

faqs.question: What is the last date to register for JEE Mains session 2 in 2025?
faqs.answer: Candidates who wish to register for the session 2 JEE Mains can do so in the month of February. The last date to register for the session 2 of JEE Mains is at the end of February. This date has already passed so candidates will need to appear for other exams like the COMEDK and CET exams that are still ongoing. More information on these exams can be found on their respective official website.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BE courses at Garden City University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BE courses at Garden City University is INR 13.2 Lacs in 2025. These fee amounts are subject to changes. Also, candidates are reminded to keep in mind that the aforementioned amount is just the tuition fee. Candidates may need to incurr addiitonal expenses to be able to pursue BE courses at Garden City University.

faqs.question: Is the COMEDK exam conducted in offline mode?
faqs.answer: No, the COMEDK exam 2025 is not an offline mode exam. The COMEDK 2025 exam is an online mode exam only and any COMEDK exam conducted in a different manner will not be acceptable for admissions. For any information regarding COMEDK exam syllabus, code of conduct, list of banned items and more, candidates are advised to check the official website for the COMEDK 2025 exam.

courses_data.name: Garden City University Bangalore MBA Admissions

faqs.question: what is fee structure of Garden City University?

faqs.question: How is engineering at Garden City University, Bangalore?
faqs.answer: Garden City University, Banglore provides undergraduate and post-graduate programs in Engineering, Technology, Management, and other fields. GCU has a well-equipped infrastructure with labs, libraries, hostels, etc. The faculty of GCU is highly qualified and well-experienced. The university offers UG course under engineering for four years. The programme is spread across eight semester which covers core engineering subjects such as Operating System,  Network Management,  Basic Electronics Engineering,  Computer Aided Engineering Drawing, etc.

faqs.question: Is there any chance of direct admission at Garden City University Bangalore for MBA?
faqs.answer: Garden City University Bangalore admission to MBA is direct. Candidates must only qualify the eligibility criteria and follow the admission procedure. MBA eligibility includes a Bachelor degree in any subject. The modes of Garden City University Bangalore admission are offline and online. Admission to various undergraduate and postgraduate courses is based on entrance exam scores and merit. The university accepts the scores of JEE Main, COMEDK UGET, KCET, KMAT, and others. Direct admission is possible for some courses but not all courses.

placement_report.college_name: Garden City University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Garden City University Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: Garden City University has not released the placement report for 2023 yet. However, as per the NIRF report 2023, the median package offered to UG (3 years) and PG (2 years) during placements 2022 stood at INR 4.5 LPA and INR 7.5 LPA , respectively. Further, a total of 388 UG (3 years) and 146 PG (2 years) students were placed during Garden City University placements 2022.

The career advisory and placement services (CAPS) facilitate uplifting the employability of its students. Garden City University assists and provides opportunities to students through its sought-after campus placement process. Additionally, the University has separate provisions for students who are interested in entrepreneurship, further education, research projects, etc. The Garden City University placement cell is connected with leading companies and thriving start-ups to deploy well-trained students.
The University offers a wide range of UG and PG courses. Some of the popular courses are MSc , BSc , BTech , and BPT .

tables.context: Has Garden City University Bangalore collaborated

faqs.question: Does Garden City University have good placements?
faqs.answer: Placements at Garden City University are sector-wise distributed with opportunities in Education (12%), Sales (17%), Information Technology (20%), Operations (25%), and Business Development (26%).

faqs.question: What is the average package offered to BSc students of Garden City University who received placements?
faqs.answer: According to the NIRF report for the session 2022-2023, the average package for under 3 years UG courses students who received placements was around INR 3.6 LPA. The data for highest package for BSc students of Garden City University is unavailable. The NIRF report also presents the data regarding how mny students received placements after graduation. According to the report, around 77 students received placements in the year 2022.

faqs.question: How many students of Garden City University BSc course got placements?
faqs.answer: The exact data for how many students of BSc course at Garden City University received placements is unavailable. According to the NIRF report, there were 77 students of UG courses of under 3 years at Garden City University who received placements in the year 2022. These students were placed with an average package of 3.6 LPA acording to the NIRF report 2022 on Garden City University.

faqs.question: Has Garden City University Bangalore collaborated with any college or university?
faqs.answer: Garden City University Bangalore has signed MoU with the world-renowned international and national universities and colleges. Garden City University Bangalore has collaborated with various universities, industries, and colleges. For this, the university has signed MoUs with several institutions and companies. The below-mentioned table reflects on the Garden City University Bangalore collaborations: Garden City University Bangalore Collaborations Hadassah Academic College, Jerusalem Universiti Putra Malaysia Ahmad Dahlan University, Yogyakarta Sorbonne University, Paris University Camilo Jose Cela, Spain Queen Mary University of London King’s College, London - -

hostel_campus.college_name: Garden City University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: I'm really very satisfied with the college, the teachers are very good and friendly.
reviews.review_text: The courses and hostel offered by our college are really very good. We have high-speed Internet, Wi-Fi connection, the library is clean and there are many books we can find, and the classrooms are clean enough with smart technologies, ACs, and good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied and can be better at taking students out for exceptions or any events.
reviews.review_text: Good library. The university has Wi-Fi and smart classrooms with AC, but the issue is that students are not allowed to use the lifts. For example, if a classroom is on the 4th floor, students are required to use the stairs, which is very tiring and unfair. Sometimes there is a power cut, but it lasts only for a short time. Within a few minutes, the power is restored so that the smart board and fans are turned on again for both students and faculty.

reviews.review_heading: Quite a good place with a student-friendly atmosphere and quality of education.
reviews.review_text: Campus is equipped with good Wi-Fi facilities, and labs consist of necessary equipment for examinations. Classrooms are spacious, though I feel they could do with some added ventilation. Library has a large variety of books and computers on various topics and is peaceful for research and reading. Girls' and boys' hostels come in various sharing options. They are well-maintained, spacious, and have individual lockers and study tables for each student. Common washrooms and separate ones, and no is...

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and supportive faculty members which make it a great choice.
reviews.review_text: The campus offers excellent Wi-Fi with spacious classrooms and a well-equipped library with access to books and journals. Sports include cricket, football, kabaddi, basketball with courts. Hostels are well-equipped with 24-hour hot water, Wi-Fi, medical facilities, spacious rooms, and hygienic restrooms. The canteen serves a hygienic variety of foods.

reviews.review_heading: It is really great for extracurricular activities and facilities are also great.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent. Facilities are all fine. The college campus is really clean and beautiful. The hostel facilities are really great like they provide good food which is decent. The hostel timings are fine. Wardens are really helpful and it is on the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well-managed and everything is working. The hostel is also good and they clean every once and week. Food quality is also very good. Sports are also considered in our college. All the facilities are provided which are required for the students.

reviews.review_heading: I’m absolutely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is pretty decent, but it doesn't provide food. There is no library in the hostel, but there is Wi-Fi. There is one sports room to play games and such. Wardens are good enough. There are no time restrictions, but the gate closes at 10.

reviews.review_heading: Balancing academics and extracurricular activities together without effecting academic pressure.
reviews.review_text: GCUs overall infrastructure is good enough for students have the potential to gain knowledge. Labs and the library are good. The hostel facilities are a little bit expensive according to area. Local surroundings are not at all good. Local citizens of the area create unnecessary trouble for people from the north area.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and a decent college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. The classrooms are clean and comfortable. You have almost all the facilities that are required. Hostel facilities are only for girls. We do have a lot of PGs around the college. The food in the hostel and everything are decent and good.

reviews.review_heading: GCU has an average college life.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are above-average. The hostel is also pretty much good but recently they have increased the fees a lot which has made the services below-average. The quality of food served is not that good. Sports are average if you are really interested.

reviews.review_heading: This college is totally value for money.
reviews.review_text: The facilities include a big food court, futsal turf, basketball, football ground, badminton, and other indoor games. It also has programs and events, which make campus life more fun. Classrooms are always clean, and we even have Wi-Fi, which makes things easier inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: A guide to my journey in GCU.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, with plenty of space and accessible classrooms and laboratories. We had full access to the library during college hours, as well as the food court and most other facilities. Since I was not in the hostel, I don't have firsthand experience, but I visited a friend's room once, and it was spacious and well-maintained. There are also various food options available.

reviews.review_heading: I love Garden City University.
reviews.review_text: In college, we have a library that is easily accessible and labs for individual courses. The facilities are very good, and they help a lot. The food court is large, with many options available. The college gives importance to sports and other activities. Hostel facilities are good, but no food is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Garden City University.
reviews.review_text: The campus here is very good and very well maintained, with lots of greenery around us. The social life is also great here as Garden City University hostel students from various states and cities and even countries get to learn new cultures, and the faculty here is also very good, helpful, and supportive in nature.

reviews.review_heading: Teaching method is not so good, but the teachers are highly knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: The library has all the course books, and we also have plenty of games, but the Wi-Fi doesn't work most of the time. The food is below average because it has too much tasting power (MSG). The library also has computers, and there are many indoor and outdoor games, as well as club activities if interested.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Garden City University

likes.text: Capgemini, Accenture, Earnest&Young and many other companies come to the college, providing placements to the students.
The placements are good for the students of management and the other courses with the sufficient satisfied salary.

Placements.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: Courts, medical facility is available, classrooms and labs are advance, canteen has good infrastructure with good quality and variety of food.
The college has great infracture with updated classrooms and labs and also haa a restaurant for hotel management students.

Infrastructure.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: Our college offers a lot of courses, and you can choose the courses of your interest.
The teaching quality of the college is very good, and teachers teach the content of the course with some extra knowledge.

likes.text: It provides the best opportunity to its students to be a management trainee which gives the wonderful exposure to them.
The college fest, extracurricular activities, events and many more things are there in the college.
